> {"content": "// ============================================\n// Odysseus UI \u2014 Main Application Orchestrator\n// ES6 module \u2014 entry point, no exports (wires all modules together)\n// ============================================\nimport Storage from './js/storage.js';\nimport uiModule from './js/ui.js';\nimport workspaceModule from './js/workspace.js';\nimport fileHandlerModule from './js/fileHandler.js';\nimport modelsModule from './js/models.js';\nimport ragModule from './js/rag.js';\nimport presetsModule from './js/presets.js';\nimport searchModule from './js/search.js';\nimport chatModule from './js/chat.js';\nimport compareModule from './js/compare/index.js';\nimport documentModule from './js/document.js';\nimport searchChatModule from './js/search-chat.js';\nimport { makeWindowDraggable } from './js/windowDrag.js';\nimport markdownModule from './js/markdown.js';\nimport chatRenderer from './js/chatRenderer.js';\nimport sessionModule from './js/sessions.js';\nimport memoryModule from './js/memory.js';\nimport voiceRecorderModule from './js/voiceRecorder.js';\nimport censorModule from './js/censor.js';\nimport galleryModule from './js/gallery.js';\nimport tasksModule from './js/tasks.js';\nimport calendarModule from './js/calendar.js';\nimport notesModule from './js/notes.js';\nimport adminModule from './js/admin.js';\nimport settingsModule from './js/settings.js';\n// Eagerly bind unified minimize/restore behavior across all tool modals.\nimport './js/modalManager.js';\n// Desktop window tiling \u2014 drag a modal near an edge/corner to snap.\nimport './js/tileManager.js';\nimport themeModule from './js/theme.js';\n// IMPORTANT: import cookbook.js with NO ?v= query \u2014 the same plain specifier\n// every other importer (cookbook-hwfit.js / cookbook-diagnosis.js) uses. A query\n// mismatch makes the browser load cookbook.js twice as separate modules (two\n// _envState objects), which broke server selection. Keep all cookbook imports\n// unversioned so this can't recur.\nimport cookbookModule from './js/cookbook.js';\nimport groupModule from './js/group.js';\nimport * as researchPanelModule from './js/research/panel.js';\nimport ttsModule from './js/tts-ai.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './js/spinner.js';\nimport { initKeyboardShortcuts } from './js/keyboard-shortcuts.js';\nimport { initSidebarLayout, syncRailSide } from './js/sidebar-layout.js';\nimport { initSectionCollapse, initSectionDrag } from './js/section-management.js';\n\nconst API_BASE = window.location.origin;\nwindow.themeModule = themeModule;\nwindow.sessionModule = sessionModule;\nwindow.uiModule = uiModule;\nwindow.adminModule = adminModule;\nwindow.cookbookModule = cookbookModule;\n\n// Redirect to login on 401 from any fetch\nconst _origFetch = window.fetch;\nwindow.fetch = async function(...args) {\n  const res = await _origFetch.apply(this, args);\n  if (res.status === 401 && !String(args[0]).includes('/api/auth/')) {\n    window.location.href = '/login';\n  }\n  return res;\n};\n\n// Search settings\n\n\nconst el = uiModule.el;\n\n// Default chat config \u2014 refreshed on every new-chat action so settings\n// changes take effect immediately (previously cached once at page load and\n// went stale when the user changed their default model).\nlet _defaultChat = null;\nasync function _refreshDefaultChat() {\n  try {\n    const d = await (await fetch('/api/default-chat')).json();\n    if (d && d.endpoint_url && d.model) {\n      _defaultChat = d;\n      try { window.__odysseusDefaultChat = d; } catch (_) {}\n      return d;\n    }\n  } catch (_) {}\n  return null;\n}\n// Prime the cache once at load for initial paint paths that read _defaultChat\n// synchronously; later reads should call _refreshDefaultChat() first.\n_refreshDefaultChat();\n\nasync function _createDirectChatFromPreferredModel() {\n  if (!sessionModule) return false;\n\n  const pending = sessionModule.getPendingChat && sessionModule.getPendingChat();\n  if (pending && pending.url && pending.modelId) {\n    sessionModule.createDirectChat(pending.url, pending.modelId, pending.endpointId);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  const sessions = sessionModule.getSessions();\n  const currentId = sessionModule.getCurrentSessionId();\n  const current = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentId);\n  if (current && current.endpoint_url && current.model) {\n    sessionModule.createDirectChat(current.endpoint_url, current.model, current.endpoint_id);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  const dc = await _refreshDefaultChat();\n  if (dc) {\n    sessionModule.createDirectChat(dc.endpoint_url, dc.model, dc.endpoint_id);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  const withModel = sessions.filter(s => s.endpoint_url && s.model);\n  if (withModel.length > 0) {\n    const last = withModel[0]; // sessions are sorted by recent\n    sessionModule.createDirectChat(last.endpoint_url, last.model, last.endpoint_id);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// EVENT LISTENERS INITIALIZATION\n// ============================================\nfunction initializeEventListeners() {\n  // Chat form submission\n//  document.getElementById('chat-form').addEventListener('submit', chatModule.handleChatSubmit);\n\n  // File attachments (inside overflow menu)\n  const _overflowAttach = el('overflow-attach-btn');\n  if (_overflowAttach) _overflowAttach.addEventListener('click', fileHandlerModule.openPicker);\n  el('file-input').addEventListener('change', (e)=>{\n    for (const f of e.target.files) fileHandlerModule.addFiles([f]);\n    fileHandlerModule.renderAttachStrip();\n    // Refocus textarea after file picker closes (mobile keyboard)\n    const ta = el('message');\n    if (ta) setTimeout(() => ta.focus(), 100);\n  });\n\n  // Paste handler\n  window.addEventListener('paste', async (e)=>{\n    if (!e.clipboardData) return;\n    let changed = false;\n    for (const item of e.clipboardData.items){\n      if (item.kind === 'file'){\n        const f = item.getAsFile();\n        if (f) {\n          fileHandlerModule.addFiles([f]);\n          changed = true;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    if (changed) fileHandlerModule.renderAttachStrip();\n  });\n\n  // Message count in the header \u2014 recount on any DOM change in\n  // #chat-history and write \"\u00b7 N msgs\" next to the title. Counts top-\n  // level .msg elements (one per user/assistant turn); excludes the\n  // welcome screen since it isn't inside chat-history.\n  const _metaCountEl = el('current-meta-count');\n  const _chatHistEl = el('chat-history');\n  if (_metaCountEl && _chatHistEl) {\n    let _countScheduled = false;\n    const _updateMsgCount = () => {\n      _countScheduled = false;\n      const n = _chatHistEl.querySelectorAll(':scope > .msg').length;\n      _metaCountEl.textContent = n ? `\u00b7 ${n} msg${n === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : '';\n    };\n    const _scheduleCount = () => {\n      if (_countScheduled) return;\n      _countScheduled = true;\n      requestAnimationFrame(_updateMsgCount);\n    };\n    new MutationObserver(_scheduleCount).observe(_chatHistEl, { childList: true });\n    _updateMsgCount();\n  }\n\n  // Scrolling\n  el('chat-history').addEventListener('scroll', uiModule.debounce(() => {\n    const box = el('chat-history');\n    const atBottom = box.scrollHeight - box.scrollTop - box.clientHeight < 80;\n    uiModule.setAutoScroll(atBottom);\n  }, 100));\n  // Close all footer popups immediately on any scroll\n  el('chat-history').addEventListener('scroll', () => {\n    document.querySelectorAll('.ctx-popup, .memory-used-detail, .msg-overflow-menu').forEach(p => p.remove());\n    document.querySelectorAll('.memory-used-pill').forEach(p => { p._openDetail = null; });\n  }, { passive: true });\n\n  el('chat-history').addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {\n    // Only disable auto-scroll when user scrolls UP (deltaY < 0)\n    if (e.deltaY < 0) uiModule.setAutoScroll(false);\n  });\n  let _touchThrottled = false;\n  el('chat-history').addEventListener('touchmove', () => {\n    if (_touchThrottled) return;\n    _touchThrottled = true;\n    uiModule.setAutoScroll(false);\n    requestAnimationFrame(() => { _touchThrottled = false; });\n  }, { passive: true });\n\n  // Internal #session-id links from AI search results\n  el('chat-history').addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n    const link = e.target.closest('a.chat-link');\n    if (!link) return;\n    const href = link.getAttribute('href');\n    if (href && href.startsWith('#') && sessionModule) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      sessionModule.selectSession(href.slice(1));\n    }\n  });\n\n  // Export dropdown button\n  const exportDlBtn = el('export-dl-btn');\n  // \u2500\u2500 Unified popup dismissal \u2500\u2500\n  // Lightweight popups (header dropdowns, kebab menus, pickers) should vanish\n  // on any \"other action\" \u2014 opening the sidebar, opening a tool window, etc.\n  // Each popup used to wire its own outside-click/Escape close but missed\n  // non-click actions. closeAllPopups() centralizes it: toggled menus drop\n  // their `.open`; ephemeral body-appended menus are removed. Full modals/\n  // windows are deliberately NOT touched here \u2014 those close via their own\n  // controls.\n  window.closeAllPopups = function closeAllPopups(except) {\n    document.querySelectorAll(\n      '.export-dropdown-menu.open, .overflow-menu.open, .model-picker-menu.open, .doc-overflow-menu.open'\n    ).forEach(m => { if (m !== except) m.classList.remove('open'); });\n    document.querySelectorAll(\n      '.skill-kebab-menu, .note-reminder-menu, .task-dropdown, .doclib-card-dropdown, .email-card-dropdown, .msg-overflow-menu'\n    ).forEach(m => { if (m !== except) m.remove(); });\n  };\n  // Window-opening / nav controls (rail buttons, sidebar tool rows + session\n  // rows, section headers) count as \"other actions\" \u2014 dismiss popups when one\n  // is clicked. Bubble phase so it runs after the control's own handler (the\n  // window is already opening; we just clear stray popups). Popup triggers\n  // themselves aren't these selectors, so toggles aren't broken.\n  document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n    if (e.target.closest('.icon-rail-btn, #sidebar .list-item, .section-header-flex')) {\n      window.closeAllPopups();\n    }\n  });\n\n  const exportMenu = el('export-dropdown-menu');\n  if (exportDlBtn && exportMenu) {\n    exportDlBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      e.stopPropagation();\n      if (exportMenu.classList.contains('open')) {\n        exportMenu.classList.remove('open');\n      } else {\n        // Move menu to body so it's not affected by ancestor transforms\n        if (exportMenu.parentElement !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(exportMenu);\n        const rect = exportDlBtn.getBoundingClientRect();\n        exportMenu.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';\n        exportMenu.style.left = 'auto';\n        exportMenu.style.right = (window.innerWidth - rect.right) + 'px';\n        exportMenu.classList.add('open');\n      }\n    });\n    document.addEventListener('click', () => exportMenu.classList.remove('open'));\n    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "ed8b6e49a807327f6d21dbf67d6ce2d63897c8b2", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/app.js", "display_title": "app.js"}

> {"content": "// static/js/chat.js\n\n/**\n * Main chat functionality - message handling and streaming\n */\n// ES6 module \u2014 IIFE removed\n\nimport Storage from './storage.js';\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport sessionModule from './sessions.js';\nimport chatRenderer from './chatRenderer.js';\nimport chatStream from './chatStream.js';\nimport { addAITTSButton } from './tts-ai.js';\nimport markdownModule from './markdown.js';\nimport { svgifyEmoji } from './markdown.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './spinner.js';\nimport presetsModule from './presets.js';\nimport fileHandlerModule from './fileHandler.js';\nimport searchModule from './search.js';\nimport documentModule from './document.js';\nimport * as emailInbox from './emailInbox.js';\nimport codeRunnerModule from './codeRunner.js';\nimport slashCommands, { initSlashCommands, isCommand, handleSlashCommand, handleSetupInput, handleSetupWizard, typewriterInto } from './slashCommands.js';\nimport createResearchSynapse from './researchSynapse.js';\nimport { createStreamRenderer } from './streamingRenderer.js';\nimport { wireArrowUpRecall, getLastUserMessageFromChatHistory } from './composerArrowUpRecall.js';\n\n  const RESEARCH_TIMEOUT_MS = 360000;\n  const DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS = 120000;\n  const RESEARCH_SVG = '<svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"8\"/><path d=\"M21 21l-4.35-4.35\"/></svg>';\n\n  let API_BASE = '';\n  let currentAbort = null;\n  let isStreaming = false;\n  // Continuous stall watchdog: while streaming, if the SSE stream produces\n  // NOTHING for STALL_THRESHOLD_MS (no deltas, no tool heartbeat \u2014 tools beat\n  // every 2s, so a full minute of silence means it's genuinely stuck or the\n  // model quietly stopped), surface a non-destructive \"still working?\" prompt\n  // instead of silently hanging. Replaces relying only on the tab-refocus\n  // recovery (which fired only on visibilitychange and silently reloaded).\n  let _stallWatchdog = null;\n  let _stallBannerShown = false;\n  const STALL_THRESHOLD_MS = 60000;\n  let _sendInFlight = false;   // covers the window from click \u2192 streaming start\n  let _displayOverride = null; // Override visible user bubble text (hides injected prompts)\n  let _hideUserBubble = false; // Skip user bubble entirely (e.g. continue after stop)\n  let _pendingContinue = null; // Stores the stopped AI element to merge with new response\n  // \u2500\u2500 Auto-recovery: when a turn's stream silently dies (connection drop) or\n  // goes quiet while the connection is alive, re-engage the model with a\n  // completion handshake instead of leaving it hung. Capped so it can't loop.\n  let _autoNudges = 0;             // handshakes fired for the CURRENT user turn\n  let _autoContinuePending = false; // marks the next submit as an auto-continue (don't reset the counter)\n  const _AUTO_NUDGE_CAP = 3;\n\n  // shortModel and modelColor are now in chatRenderer.js\n  var _shortModel = chatRenderer.shortModel;\n  var _modelRouteLabel = chatRenderer.modelRouteLabel;\n  var _sameModelName = chatRenderer.sameModelName;\n  var _applyModelColor = chatRenderer.applyModelColor;\n  function _setRoleModelLabel(roleEl, requestedModel, actualModel, opts) {\n    if (!roleEl) return;\n    opts = opts || {};\n    const tsSpan = roleEl.querySelector('.role-timestamp');\n    const req = requestedModel || actualModel || '';\n    const actual = actualModel || requestedModel || '';\n    let label = _modelRouteLabel(req, actual);\n    if (opts.suffix) label += ' (' + opts.suffix + ')';\n    if (opts.characterName) label = opts.characterName;\n    roleEl.textContent = label + ' ';\n    _applyModelColor(roleEl, actual || req);\n    if (req && actual && !_sameModelName(req, actual)) {\n      roleEl.title = req + ' -> ' + actual + (opts.reason ? ': ' + opts.reason : '');\n    } else if (!opts.reason) {\n      roleEl.removeAttribute('title');\n    }\n    if (tsSpan) roleEl.appendChild(tsSpan);\n  }\n  // Per-session research tracking (supports concurrent research across sessions)\n  const _researchingStreamIds = new Set();\n  let _researchTimerEl = null, _researchTimerInterval = null;\n  let _researchStartTime = 0, _researchAvgDuration = null;\n  let _researchSynapse = null;\n  function _clearResearchTimer() {\n    if (_researchTimerInterval) { clearInterval(_researchTimerInterval); _researchTimerInterval = null; }\n    if (_researchTimerEl) { _researchTimerEl.remove(); _researchTimerEl = null; }\n    if (_researchSynapse) {\n      // Mark complete first so the user briefly sees the \"done\" state,\n      // then tear it down on next tick.\n      try { _researchSynapse.complete(); } catch {}\n      const s = _researchSynapse;\n      _researchSynapse = null;\n      setTimeout(() => { try { s.destroy(); } catch {} }, 800);\n    }\n    _researchStartTime = 0;\n    _researchAvgDuration = null;\n  }\n\n  /** Append a \"Generate Visual Report\" button \u2014 delegates to chatRenderer. */\n  function _appendViewReportLink(msgEl, sessionId) {\n    const body = msgEl.querySelector('.body');\n    if (body) chatRenderer.appendReportButton(body, sessionId);\n  }\n  let currentAccumulated = ''; // Track accumulated text across function scope\n  let currentHolder = null; // Track current message holder\n  let currentSpinner = null; // Track current spinner for stop cleanup\n\n  // Background streaming support\n  const _backgroundStreams = new Map(); // sessionId -> { status, accumulated, sourcesHtml, abortCtrl, query, metrics }\n  const _resumingStreams = new Set();   // sessionId -> a resumeStream() reader is live (re-attach lock)\n  let _streamSessionId = null; // Session ID for the currently active reader loop\n  let _lastReaderActivity = 0; // Timestamp of last reader.read() success \u2014 used to detect frozen streams\n  let _webLockRelease = null;  // Function to release the Web Lock held during streaming\n\n  /** Check if an SSE reader is still actively connected for a session. */\n  function hasActiveStream(sessionId) {\n    return _streamSessionId === sessionId || _backgroundStreams.has(sessionId) ||\n           _resumingStreams.has(sessionId);\n  }\n\n  // Sources box builder and toggleSources are now in chatRenderer.js\n  var _buildSourcesBox = chatRenderer.buildSourcesBox;\n\n  // Browser notifications now in chatStream.js\n  var _notifyResearchComplete = chatStream.notifyResearchComplete;\n\n  // Model/image pricing, _buildImageBubble now in chatRenderer.js\n  var _buildImageBubble = chatRenderer.buildImageBubble;\n  var getModelCost = chatRenderer.getModelCost;\n  var getImageCost = chatRenderer.getImageCost;\n\n  // stripToolBlocks and roleTimestamp now in chatRenderer.js\n  var stripToolBlocks = chatRenderer.stripToolBlocks;\n\n  function _normalizeEndpointForCompare(url) {\n    if (!url) return '';\n    try {\n      const u = new URL(String(url), window.location.origin);\n      let path = u.pathname.replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n      const suffixes = [\n        '/v1/chat/completions', '/chat/completions',\n        '/v1/completions', '/completions',\n        '/v1/messages', '/messages',\n        '/v1/models', '/models',\n      ];\n      for (const suffix of suffixes) {\n        if (path.toLowerCase().endsWith(suffix)) {\n          path = path.slice(0, -suffix.length).replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n          break;\n        }\n      }\n      return (u.origin + path).toLowerCase();\n    } catch (_) {\n      return String(url).trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '').toLowerCase();\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function _probeCurrentEndpointStatus(endpointUrl, signal) {\n    const target = _normalizeEndpointForCompare(endpointUrl);\n    if (!target) return null;\n    const modelsRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/models`, { credentials: 'same-origin', signal });\n    if (!modelsRes.ok) return null;\n    const modelsData = await modelsRes.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    const item = (modelsData.items || []).find(ep =>\n      _normalizeEndpointForCompare(ep.url || ep.endpoint_url || ep.base_url) === target\n    );\n    if (!item || !item.endpoint_id) return null;\n\n    const probesRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/model-endpoints/probe-local`, {\n      credentials: 'same-origin',\n      signal,\n    });\n    if (!probesRes.ok) return null;\n    const probes = await probesRes.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return probes[item.endpoint_id] || null;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Initialize with dependencies\n   */\n  export function init(apiBase) {\n    API_BASE = apiBase;\n    initSlashCommands({ apiBase, isStreaming: () => isStreaming });\n    // Initialize email inbox\n    emailInbox.init(documentModule);\n    // Wire the slash-command autocomplete popup on the chat composer. The\n    // dispatcher already handles the typed command \u2014 this just surfaces the\n    // registry as a discoverable menu when the user starts a message with /.\n    import('./slashAutocomplete.js').then(mod => {\n      const ta = document.getElementById('message');\n      if (ta && mod.initSlashAutocomplete) mod.initSlashAutocomplete(ta);\n    }).catch(() => {});\n\n    // ArrowUp on empty composer recalls last user message (like many chat apps).\n    const _wireArrowUpRecall = (composer) =>\n      wireArrowUpRecall(composer, () => getLastUserMessageFromChatHistory(), {\n        autoResize: uiModule?.autoResize,\n      });\n\n    const composer = document.getElementById('message');\n    if (!_wireArrowUpRecall(composer)) {\n      // Init can run before #message exists (templated UI); short retries only.\n      try { requestAnimationFrame(() => _wireArrowUpRecall(document.getElementById('message'))); } catch (_) {}\n      setTimeout(() => _wireArrowUpRecall(document.getElementById('message')), 250);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // addMessage, createMsgFooter, displayMetrics, hideWelcomeScreen, showWelcomeScreen\n  // are now in chatRenderer.js \u2014 referenced via the public API delegation above.\n  var addMessage = chatRenderer.addMessage;\n  var createMsgFooter = chatRenderer.createMsgFooter;\n  var displayMetrics = chatRenderer.displayMetrics;\n  var hideWelcomeScreen = chatRenderer.hideWelcomeScreen;\n  var showWelcomeScreen = chatRenderer.showWelcomeScreen;\n\n  /**\n   * Update submit button state\n   */\n  function updateSubmitButton(state, submitBtn) {\n    if (!submitBtn) return;\n\n    if (state === 'streaming') {\n      // Clear any pending transitions from + \u2192 arrow swap\n      submitBtn.classList.remove('anim-spin', 'anim-spin-swap', 'anim-land', 'mic-mode', 'newchat-mode', 'newchat-expanded', 'recording');\n      // Ensure arrow icon is showing before launch\n      var icons = window._odysseusBtnIcons;\n      if (icons) submitBtn.innerHTML = icons.send;\n      void submitBtn.offsetWidth;\n      // Arrow launches up, then stop icon lands in\n      submitBtn.classList.add('anim-launch');\n      const _stopSvg = '<svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\"><rect x=\"6\" y=\"6\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" rx=\"2\"/></svg>';\n      // Wait for the launch keyframe to finish (0.3s) before swapping the\n      // arrow out for the stop icon \u2014 otherwise the swap happens mid-flight\n      // and the user sees nothing fly out.\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        submitBtn.innerHTML = _stopSvg;\n        submitBtn.classList.remove('anim-launch');\n        void submitBtn.offsetWidth;\n        submitBtn.classList.add('anim-land');\n        submitBtn.addEventListener('animationend', () => submitBtn.classList.remove('anim-land'), { once: true });\n      }, 300);\n      submitBtn.title = 'Stop generation';\n      submitBtn.dataset.mode = 'streaming';\n      submitBtn.dataset.phase = 'processing';\n      isStreaming = true;\n      _startStallWatchdog();\n    } else if (state === 'idle') {\n      submitBtn.dataset.mode = '';\n      delete submitBtn.dataset.phase;\n      submitBtn.classList.remove('recording');\n      isStreaming = false;\n      _stopStallWatchdog();\n      // Defer to global updater which handles mic/newchat/send modes\n      if (window._updateSendBtnIcon) {\n        setTimeout(window._updateSendBtnIcon, 50);\n      } else {\n        var icons = window._odysseusBtnIcons;\n        submitBtn.innerHTML = icons ? icons.send : '<svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7\"/></svg>';\n        submitBtn.title = 'Send message';\n        submitBtn.classList.remove('mic-mode', 'newchat-mode');\n      }", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "a9d89cc64daa6e8f2e983f0b66dd3977070a834d", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/chat.js", "display_title": "chat.js"}

>
> </details>
>
> I’ve got the core pattern: Odysseus is not “cleaner” because it has fewer features; it uses modal/window mechanics, a dense session sidebar, and lazy tool surfaces so the main chat stays comparatively simple. I’m reading model picker and Cookbook now, since that maps directly to our Models and Warsat tabs.

> {"content": "// Model Picker \u2014 chatbox model selector dropdown\n// Extracted from sessions.js\n\nimport { providerLogo } from './providers.js';\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport settingsModule from './settings.js';\nimport { sortModelObjects } from './modelSort.js';\n\nconst API_BASE = window.location.origin;\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Recent + Favorites persistence \u2500\u2500\n// Recent is auto-tracked (last 5 picks, most-recent-first) and lives in its\n// own key. Favorites is the SAME key the sidebar Models section uses, so a\n// favorite toggled here shows up there and vice-versa.\nconst RECENT_KEY = 'odysseus-model-recent';\nconst FAVORITES_KEY = 'odysseus-model-favorites';\nconst RECENT_MAX = 5;\n// Catalogs at or below this size are small enough that hiding everything\n// behind search would be a regression \u2014 keep listing them in browse mode.\nconst BROWSE_ALL_LIMIT = 12;\n\nfunction _loadList(key) {\n  try {\n    const a = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || '[]');\n    return Array.isArray(a) ? a : [];\n  } catch { return []; }\n}\nfunction _saveList(key, list) {\n  try { localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(list)); } catch { /* quota / private mode */ }\n}\nfunction _loadRecent() { return _loadList(RECENT_KEY); }\nfunction _pushRecent(mid) {\n  if (!mid) return;\n  const next = _loadRecent().filter(x => x !== mid);\n  next.unshift(mid);\n  _saveList(RECENT_KEY, next.slice(0, RECENT_MAX));\n}\nfunction _loadFavorites() { return _loadList(FAVORITES_KEY); }\nfunction _toggleFavorite(mid) {\n  const favs = _loadFavorites();\n  const i = favs.indexOf(mid);\n  if (i >= 0) favs.splice(i, 1);\n  else favs.push(mid);\n  _saveList(FAVORITES_KEY, favs);\n  // Keep the sidebar Models section (same key) in sync if it's mounted.\n  try {\n    if (window.modelsModule && typeof window.modelsModule.refreshModels === 'function') {\n      window.modelsModule.refreshModels();\n    }\n  } catch { /* sidebar not present */ }\n  return i < 0; // true when now favorited\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Shared keyboard nav for model pickers \u2500\u2500\nfunction _handlePickerKeydown(e, listEl, itemSelector, closeFn) {\n  if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeFn(); return; }\n  if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    const active = listEl.querySelector(itemSelector + '.kb-active') || listEl.querySelector(itemSelector);\n    if (active) active.click();\n    return;\n  }\n  if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 'ArrowUp') {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    const items = [...listEl.querySelectorAll(itemSelector)].filter(el => el.style.display !== 'none');\n    if (!items.length) return;\n    const cur = items.findIndex(el => el.classList.contains('kb-active'));\n    items.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('kb-active'));\n    let next;\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') next = cur < items.length - 1 ? cur + 1 : 0;\n    else next = cur > 0 ? cur - 1 : items.length - 1;\n    items[next].classList.add('kb-active');\n    items[next].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });\n  }\n}\n\n// Dependencies injected via initModelPicker()\nlet _deps = null;\nlet _autoSelectingDefault = false;\n\nfunction _modelExists(modelId, url) {\n  if (!modelId || !window.modelsModule || !window.modelsModule.getCachedItems) return false;\n  const items = window.modelsModule.getCachedItems() || [];\n  if (!items.length) return true;\n  const targetUrl = (url || '').replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n  return items.some(item => {\n    if (item.offline) return false;\n    const itemUrl = (item.url || '').replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n    const models = (item.models || []).concat(item.models_extra || []);\n    return models.includes(modelId) && (!targetUrl || itemUrl === targetUrl);\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Initialize the model picker dropdown.\n * @param {Object} deps\n * @param {function} deps.getCurrentSessionId - returns current session ID\n * @param {function} deps.getSessions - returns sessions array\n * @param {function} deps.getPendingChat - returns _pendingChat object\n * @param {function} deps.setPendingChat - sets _pendingChat object\n * @param {function} deps.createDirectChat - creates a new direct chat session\n */\nexport function initModelPicker(deps) {\n  _deps = deps;\n  _initModelPickerDropdown();\n}\n\nfunction _initModelPickerDropdown() {\n  const wrap = document.getElementById('model-picker-wrap');\n  const btn = document.getElementById('model-picker-btn');\n  const menu = document.getElementById('model-picker-menu');\n  const search = document.getElementById('model-picker-search');\n  const listEl = document.getElementById('model-picker-list');\n  const searchRow = menu ? menu.querySelector('.model-picker-search-row') : null;\n  if (!wrap || !btn || !menu || !search || !listEl) return;\n\n  function _close() {\n    if (menu.classList.contains('hidden')) return;\n    // Restore scroll button\n    const _scrollBtn = document.getElementById('scroll-bottom-btn');\n    if (_scrollBtn) _scrollBtn.style.display = '';\n    menu.classList.add('closing');\n    menu.addEventListener('animationend', function _onDone() {\n      menu.removeEventListener('animationend', _onDone);\n      menu.classList.remove('closing');\n      menu.classList.add('hidden');\n      search.value = '';\n    }, { once: true });\n    // Fallback if animationend doesn't fire\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      if (!menu.classList.contains('hidden')) {\n        menu.classList.remove('closing');\n        menu.classList.add('hidden');\n        search.value = '';\n      }\n    }, 200);\n  }\n\n  function _openPickerShortcut(kind) {\n    _close();\n    try {\n      if (kind === 'cookbook') {\n        if (window.cookbookModule && typeof window.cookbookModule.open === 'function') {\n          window.cookbookModule.open();\n        } else {\n          const btn = document.getElementById('tool-cookbook-btn') || document.getElementById('rail-cookbook');\n          if (btn) btn.click();\n          else location.hash = '#cookbook';\n        }\n      } else if (kind === 'settings') {\n        if (settingsModule && typeof settingsModule.open === 'function') settingsModule.open();\n      } else if (window.adminModule && typeof window.adminModule.open === 'function') {\n        window.adminModule.open('services');\n      } else if (settingsModule && typeof settingsModule.open === 'function') {\n        settingsModule.open('services');\n      }\n    } catch (_) {}\n  }\n\n  // Local endpoint health \u2014 only probed for LOCAL endpoints, since\n  // cloud APIs are essentially always up. Cached briefly on the\n  // server side too (8s TTL). Picker opens trigger a refresh.\n  let _localProbe = {};            // {endpoint_id: {alive, latency_ms, error}}\n  let _localProbeFetchedAt = 0;\n  const _LOCAL_PROBE_TTL_MS = 5000;\n\n  async function _refreshLocalProbe() {\n    const now = Date.now();\n    if (now - _localProbeFetchedAt < _LOCAL_PROBE_TTL_MS) return;\n    _localProbeFetchedAt = now;\n    try {\n      const r = await fetch('/api/model-endpoints/probe-local', { credentials: 'same-origin' });\n      if (r.ok) _localProbe = (await r.json()) || {};\n    } catch (_) { /* leave stale data; picker still works */ }\n  }\n\n  function _getAllModels() {\n    const items = (window.modelsModule && window.modelsModule.getCachedItems) ? window.modelsModule.getCachedItems() : [];\n    const result = [];\n    const seen = new Set();\n    items.forEach(item => {\n      // Previously: offline endpoints were skipped entirely, so a server\n      // that briefly went down disappeared from the picker \u2014 confusing\n      // when the user can still see it (offline-tagged) in Settings.\n      // Now: include offline-endpoint models too but flag them\n      // `stale: true` so the row renderer dims them + shows the offline\n      // pill. The user can still click and try anyway (matches the\n      // existing \"local server appears offline\" path on line 301).\n      const epOffline = !!item.offline;\n      const allModels = (item.models || []).concat(item.models_extra || []);\n      const allDisplay = (item.models_display || []).concat(item.models_extra_display || []);\n      // Mark local endpoints whose live probe failed.\n      const probeResult = item.endpoint_id ? _localProbe[item.endpoint_id] : null;\n      const isLocalDead = !!(probeResult && probeResult.alive === false);\n      allModels.forEach((mid, i) => {\n        // Deduplicate by model ID \u2014 prefer ONLINE endpoint entries over\n        // offline duplicates so the user gets a working endpoint first\n        // when the same model is exposed by both.\n        if (seen.has(mid)) return;\n        seen.add(mid);\n        result.push({\n          mid,\n          display: (allDisplay[i] || mid).split('/').pop(),\n          url: item.url,\n          endpointId: item.endpoint_id,\n          epName: item.endpoint_name || '',\n          providerText: [\n            item.endpoint_name || '',\n            item.category || '',\n            item.host || '',\n            item.url || '',\n          ].filter(Boolean).join(' '),\n          stale: isLocalDead || epOffline,\n          staleReason: epOffline\n            ? (item.ping_error || 'endpoint offline')\n            : (isLocalDead ? (probeResult.error || 'not responding') : ''),\n          offline: epOffline,\n        });\n      });\n    });\n    return sortModelObjects(result);\n  }\n\n  // \u2500\u2500 Provider display names and grouping \u2500\u2500\n  const _PROVIDER_NAMES = {\n    '01-ai': 'Yi', 'abacusai': 'Abacus AI', 'adept': 'Adept',\n    'ai21': 'AI21 Labs', 'ai21labs': 'AI21 Labs', 'aion-labs': 'Aion Labs',\n    'aisingapore': 'AI Singapore', 'allenai': 'Allen AI', 'amazon': 'Amazon',\n    'anthracite-org': 'Anthracite', 'anthropic': 'Anthropic', 'arcee-ai': 'Arcee AI',\n    'baai': 'BAAI', 'baidu': 'Baidu', 'bigcode': 'BigCode',\n    'black-forest-labs': 'Black Forest Labs', 'bytedance': 'ByteDance',\n    'bytedance-seed': 'ByteDance', 'cognitivecomputations': 'Cognitive Computations',\n    'cohere': 'Cohere', 'databricks': 'Databricks', 'deepcogito': 'DeepCogito',\n    'deepseek': 'DeepSeek', 'deepseek-ai': 'DeepSeek', 'essentialai': 'Essential AI',\n    'google': 'Google', 'gryphe': 'Gryphe', 'ibm': 'IBM',\n    'ibm-granite': 'IBM Granite', 'inception': 'Inception',\n    'inclusionai': 'Inclusion AI', 'inflection': 'Inflection',\n    'kwaipilot': 'KwaiPilot', 'liquid': 'Liquid AI', > {"content": "// ============================================\n// COOKBOOK MODULE (v2 \u2014 simplified)\n// What Fits? + Saved presets, inline action panels\n// ============================================\n\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './spinner.js';\nimport { providerLogo } from './providers.js';\nimport { makeWindowDraggable } from './windowDrag.js';\nimport { _diagnose, _showDiagnosis, _clearDiagnosis, _runQuickCmd, ERROR_PATTERNS } from './cookbook-diagnosis.js';\nimport { _hwfitCache, _hwfitDebounce, _hwfitFetch, _hwfitInit, _hwfitRenderList, _hwfitRenderHw, _renderGpuToggles, _expandModelRow, _fitColors, _hwfitColumns, _cachedModelIds, _gpuToggleTotal, _resetGpuToggleState } from './cookbook-hwfit.js';\n\n// Sub-modules\nimport {\n  initRunning,\n  _loadTasks, _saveTasks, _addTask, _removeTask,\n  _tmuxCmd, _renderRunningTab, _clearCookbookNotif,\n  _launchServeTask, _serveAutoFix, _serveAutoRetry, _serveAutoRetryReplace, _serveAutoRetryRemove,\n  _startBackgroundMonitor, _syncFromServer,\n  _retryDownload, _nextAvailablePort, _processQueue,\n  _selfHealStaleTasks,\n} from './cookbookRunning.js';\n\nimport {\n  initDownload,\n  _setPanelField, _setPanelCheckbox,\n  _wirePanelEvents, _runPanelCmd, _runModelDownload, _buildDownloadCmd,\n} from './cookbookDownload.js';\n\nimport {\n  initServe,\n  _fetchCachedModels, _cachedAllModels, _filterCachedList, _rerenderCachedModels, _deleteCachedModel,\n} from './cookbookServe.js';\n\nconst STORAGE_KEY = 'cookbook-presets';\nconst LAST_STATE_KEY = 'cookbook-last-state';\nconst SERVE_STATE_KEY = 'cookbook-serve-state';\n\n// Global, once: tag chip rows (.doclib-lang-chips) scroll horizontally on mobile.\n// Stop their touch events (capture phase, before any ancestor sees them) so a\n// sideways tag scroll never triggers a swipe-to-change-tab / swipe-dismiss\n// gesture in ANY modal (cookbook, document library, etc.). We don't preventDefault,\n// so the browser's native horizontal scroll of the chips still works.\nif (typeof window !== 'undefined' && !window._tagScrollGuardWired) {\n  window._tagScrollGuardWired = true;\n  ['touchstart', 'touchmove'].forEach(evt => {\n    document.addEventListener(evt, (e) => {\n      const t = e.target;\n      if (t && t.closest && t.closest('.doclib-lang-chips')) e.stopPropagation();\n    }, true);\n  });\n}\n\n// Radio-style check marking which model directory is a server's download target.\n// OFF = hollow circle (pickable); ON = checked circle (accent-tinted via CSS).\nexport const _MODELDIR_CHECK_OFF = '<svg width=\"13\" height=\"13\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\"/></svg>';\nexport const _MODELDIR_CHECK_ON = '<svg width=\"13\" height=\"13\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.6\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\"/><polyline points=\"8 12 11 15 16 9\"/></svg>';\n\n// Monochrome platform glyphs (currentColor) for a server's OS tag: a penguin for\n// Linux, the four-pane logo for Windows, an Android robot for Termux/Android.\nfunction _platformIcon(platform) {\n  const k = (platform || '').toLowerCase();\n  if (k === 'windows') {\n    return '<svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" fill=\"currentColor\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"M3 4.6l8-1.2v8.1H3V4.6zm9-1.3L21 2v9.5h-9V3.3zM3 12.5h8v8.1l-8-1.2v-6.9zm9 0h9V22l-9-1.3v-8.2z\"/></svg>';\n  }\n  if (k === 'termux' || k === 'android') {\n    return '<svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" fill=\"currentColor\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"M7 9h10v6.6a1 1 0 0 1-1 1h-.7v2.6a1.15 1.15 0 1 1-2.3 0V16.6h-1.5v2.6a1.15 1.15 0 1 1-2.3 0V16.6H8a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V9zM4.3 9.1a1.15 1.15 0 0 1 2.3 0v4.6a1.15 1.15 0 1 1-2.3 0V9.1zm13.1 0a1.15 1.15 0 0 1 2.3 0v4.6a1.15 1.15 0 1 1-2.3 0V9.1zM8 8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0H8zm1.7-2.6-.8-1.2a.28.28 0 0 1 .47-.3l.83 1.25a4.8 4.8 0 0 1 3.66 0l.83-1.25a.28.28 0 0 1 .47.3L14.3 5.4M9.8 6.6a.62.62 0 1 0 0-1.24.62.62 0 0 0 0 1.24zm4.4 0a.62.62 0 1 0 0-1.24.62.62 0 0 0 0 1.24z\"/></svg>';\n  }\n  if (k === 'linux' || k === 'termux-linux') {\n    return '<svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" fill=\"currentColor\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"M12 2a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v4.7c0 .9-.4 1.7-1 2.4-1.2 1.4-2 3-2 4.5C5 20.4 8.1 22 12 22s7-1.6 7-4.4c0-1.5-.8-3.1-2-4.5-.6-.7-1-1.5-1-2.4V6a4 4 0 0 0-4-4zm-1.7 4.8a1 1 0 1 1 0 2 1 1 0 0 1 0-2zm3.4 0a1 1 0 1 1 0 2 1 1 0 0 1 0-2zM12 9.4c.75 0 1.4.45 1.7 1.1h-3.4c.3-.65.95-1.1 1.7-1.1z\"/></svg>';\n  }\n  return '';\n}\n\nexport let _envState = { env: 'none', envPath: '', hfToken: '', hfTokenConfigured: false, hfTokenMasked: '', gpus: '', remoteHost: '', servers: [], modelPaths: [], platform: '', defaultServer: '' };\nlet _lastCacheHostVal = null;\nlet _cookbookOpeningSpinners = [];\nexport function _lastCacheHost() { return _lastCacheHostVal; }\nexport function _setLastCacheHost(v) { _lastCacheHostVal = v; }\n\nfunction _setCookbookOpening(on) {\n  // Sidebar (tool-cookbook-btn) deliberately excluded \u2014 the inline\n  // whirlpool on the sidebar row read as \"the click didn't register\"\n  // rather than \"loading\", which made users (rightly) think clicks\n  // were being eaten. Keep only the icon-rail spinner since the\n  // rail is narrow enough that an obvious loading state still helps.\n  const targets = [\n    document.getElementById('rail-cookbook'),\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n  if (!on) {\n    _cookbookOpeningSpinners.forEach(({ spinner, wrap, target }) => {\n      try { spinner?.stop?.(); } catch {}\n      try { wrap?.remove?.(); } catch {}\n      target?.classList?.remove('cookbook-opening');\n    });\n    _cookbookOpeningSpinners = [];\n    return;\n  }\n  if (_cookbookOpeningSpinners.length) return;\n  targets.forEach(target => {\n    const spinner = spinnerModule.create('', 'clean', 'whirlpool');\n    spinner._wpSize = target.id === 'rail-cookbook' ? 12 : 13;\n    const wrap = document.createElement('span');\n    wrap.className = 'cookbook-open-loading';\n    wrap.appendChild(spinner.createElement());\n    target.appendChild(wrap);\n    target.classList.add('cookbook-opening');\n    spinner.start();\n    _cookbookOpeningSpinners.push({ spinner, wrap, target });\n  });\n}\n\n/** Build server <option> HTML from _envState.servers. excludeLocal skips local-only entries. */\n// True for the local server entry (empty / \"local\" / \"localhost\" host).\nfunction _isLocalEntry(s) { return !s || !s.host || s.host === 'local' || s.host.toLowerCase() === 'localhost'; }\n\n// Resolve a dropdown option value to a server entry. New option values are\n// stable per-profile keys, so same-host SSH profiles stay distinguishable.\n// Host strings and numeric indices remain accepted for stale saved state.\nexport function _serverKey(s) {\n  if (_isLocalEntry(s)) return 'local';\n  return 'srv:' + [\n    s?.name || '',\n    s?.host || '',\n    s?.port || '',\n    s?.envPath || '',\n    s?.platform || '',\n  ].map(v => encodeURIComponent(String(v).trim())).join('|');\n}\n\nexport function _serverByVal(val) {\n  if (val == null || val === 'local' || val === '') return null;\n  const raw = String(val);\n  let s = _envState.servers.find(x => _serverKey(x) === raw);\n  if (!s) s = _envState.servers.find(x => x.host === raw);\n  if (!s) s = _envState.servers.find(x => x.name === raw);\n  if (!s && /^\\d+$/.test(String(val))) s = _envState.servers[parseInt(val)];\n  return s || null;\n}\n\nexport function _selectedServer() {\n  if (_envState.remoteServerKey) {\n    const keyed = _serverByVal(_envState.remoteServerKey);\n    if (keyed) return keyed;\n  }\n  if (_envState.remoteHost) return _envState.servers.find(s => s.host === _envState.remoteHost) || null;\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function _currentServerValue() {\n  const selected = _selectedServer();\n  if (selected) return _serverKey(selected);\n  return _envState.remoteHost || 'local';\n}\n\nconst GEMMA4_THINKING_CHAT_TEMPLATE = `{% for message in messages %}{% if message['role'] == 'system' %}<|turn>system\\n<|think|>{{ message['content'] }}<turn|>\\n{% elif message['role'] == 'user' %}<|turn>user\\n{{ message['content'] }}<turn|>\\n{% elif message['role'] == 'assistant' %}<|turn>model\\n{{ message['content'] }}<turn|>\\n{% endif %}{% endfor %}{% if add_generation_prompt %}<|turn>model\\n<|channel>thought{% endif %}`;\n\nfunction _isGemma4ThinkingModel(modelName) {\n  const n = (modelName || '').toLowerCase();\n  return n.includes('gemma-4') || n.includes('gemma4');\n}\n\nfunction _gemma4ThinkingChatTemplateArg(modelName) {\n  return _isGemma4ThinkingModel(modelName)\n    ? _shellQuote(GEMMA4_THINKING_CHAT_TEMPLATE)\n    : '';\n}\n\nfunction _buildServerOpts(excludeLocal = false) {\n  // The local server is ALWAYS represented by the synthetic value=\"local\" option\n  // (showing its custom name from the \"server name\" feature). We must therefore\n  // skip that same entry in the loop below \u2014 otherwise it appeared twice.\n  const _localIdx = _envState.servers.findIndex(_isLocalEntry);\n  const _localSrv = _localIdx >= 0 ? _envState.servers[_localIdx] : null;\n  const _localLabel = (_localSrv && _localSrv.name) ? _localSrv.name : 'Local';\n  let html = `<option value=\"local\"${!_envState.remoteHost ? ' selected' : ''}>${esc(_localLabel)}</option>`;\n  const selectedKey = _envState.remoteServerKey || '';\n  let legacyHostSelected = false;\n  for (let i = 0; i < _envState.servers.length; i++) {\n    const s = _envState.servers[i];\n    if (i === _localIdx) continue;                 // already the synthetic \"local\" option\n    if (excludeLocal && _isLocalEntry(s)) continue;\n    const label = s.name || s.host || `Server ${i + 1}`;\n    const value = _serverKey(s);\n    let selected = selectedKey ? value === selectedKey : false;\n    if (!selectedKey && _envState.remoteHost === s.host && !legacyHostSelected) {\n      selected = true;\n      legacyHostSelected = true;\n    }\n    html += `<option value=\"${esc(value)}\"${selected ? ' selected' : ''}>${esc(label)}</option>`;\n  }\n  return html;\n}\n\n/** Wrap a command in SSH for a remote host, with proper single-quote escaping. */\nexport function _sshCmd(host, cmd, port) {\n  const portFlag = port && port !== '22' ? `-p ${port} ` : '';\n  return `ssh ${portFlag}${host} '${cmd.replace(/'/g, \"'\\\\''\")}'`;\n}\n\n/** Get SSH port for a given host (or task object) */\nfunction _getPort(hostOrTask) {\n  if (!hostOrTask) return '';\n  if (typeof hostOrTask === 'object') return hostOrTask.sshPort || _getPort(hostOrTask.remoteServerKey || hostOrTask.remoteHost);\n  const selected = hostOrTask === _envState.remoteHost ? _selectedServer() : null;\n  const srv = selected || _serverByVal(hostOrTask);\n  return srv?.port || '';\n}\n\n/** Get platform for a given host (or task object). Returns 'windows', 'termux', 'linux', or '' */\nexport function _getPlatform(hostOrTask) {\n  if (!hostOrTask) return _envState.platform || '';\n  if (typeof hostOrTask === 'object') return hostOrTask.platform || _getPlatform(hostOrTask.remoteServerKey || hostOrTask.remoteHost);\n  const selected = hostOrTask === _envState.remoteHost ? _selectedServer() : null;\n  const srv = selected || _serverByVal(hostOrTask);\n  return srv?.platform || '';\n}\n\n/** Check if the current active server is Windows */\nexport function _isWindows(hostOrTask) {\n  return _getPlatform(hostOrTask) === 'windows';\n}\n\n/** Check if the detected (local) hardware is Apple Silicon / Metal. Keys off the\n *  hardware probe's backend rather than a platform string, since a local Mac\n *  reports no platform but does report backend: \"metal\". */\nexport function _isMetal() {\n  return ['metal', 'mps', 'apple'].includes(String(_hwfitCache?.system?.backend || '').toLowerCase());\n}\n\n/** Detect model-specific vLLM optimizations */\nfunction _detectModelOptimizations(modelName) {\n  const n = (modelName || '').toLowerCase();\n  const opts = { envVars: [], flags: [], tips: [] };\n\n  // Qwen3.5 MoE models\n  if (n.includes('qwen3.5') || n.includes('qwen3-') && (n.includes('a10b') || n.includes('a22b') || n.includes('a3b'))) {\n    opts.envVars.push('VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=0', 'VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP16=1', 'VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER=0', 'OMP_NUM_THREADS=4');\n    opts.flags.push('--enable-expert-parallel', '--reasoning-parser qwen3');\n    opts.tips.push('MoE optimizations: expert parallel + flashinfer MoE kernels');\n  }\n  // Qwen3 MoE (non-3.5)\n  else if (n.includes('qwen3') && (n.includes('a10b') || n.includes('a22b') || n.includes('a3b'))) {\n    opts.envVars.push('VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=0', 'VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP16=1');\n    opts.flags.push('--enable-expert-parallel', '--reasoning-parser qwen3');\n    opts.tips.push('MoE optimizations: expert parallel');\n  }\n  // DeepSeek MoE\n  else if (n.includes('deepseek') && (n.includes('v3') || n.includes('r1'))) {\n    opts.flags.push('--enable-expert-parallel');\n    opts.tips.push('MoE expert parallel for DeepSeek');\n  }\n  // Speculative decoding \u2014 pick the right MTP method per model family.\n  // opts.spec.{method,tokens} seed the UI dropdown/input; the actual flag is\n  // assembled by the command builder so the user can edit before launching.\n  let specDefault = null;\n  if (n.includes('qwen3-next') || (n.includes('qwen3.5') && (n.includes('a10b') || n.includes('a22b')))) {\n    specDefault = { method: 'qwen3_next_mtp', tokens: 2 };\n  } else if (\n    (n.includes('deepseek') && (n.includes('v3') || n.includes('v3.1') || n.includes('r1'))) ||", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "2abb263baadf3b759f220f78382eb1ab47cacf18", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/cookbook.js", "display_title": "cookbook.js"}

> {"content": "// static/js/models.js\n\n/**\n * Model and provider management\n */\n\nimport Storage from './storage.js';\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport sessionModule from './sessions.js';\nimport dragSortModule from './dragSort.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './spinner.js';\nimport { modelColor } from './chatRenderer.js';\nimport { providerLogo } from './providers.js';\nimport { sortModelIds } from './modelSort.js';\n\nlet API_BASE = '';\nlet _cachedItems = []; // cached /api/models items for model-switch dropdown\nlet _lastFetchTime = 0;\nlet _fetchInflight = null;\nconst _FETCH_CACHE_TTL = 30000; // 30s client-side cache for /api/models\nconst COLLAPSE_KEY = 'odysseus-models-collapsed';\nconst FAVORITES_KEY = 'odysseus-model-favorites';\nconst USAGE_KEY = 'odysseus-model-usage';\nconst SORT_KEY = 'odysseus-model-sort';\n\nexport function init(apiBase) {\n  API_BASE = apiBase;\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Collapse state persistence \u2500\u2500\nfunction _loadCollapsed() {\n  return Storage.getJSON(COLLAPSE_KEY, {});\n}\nfunction _saveCollapsed(state) {\n  Storage.setJSON(COLLAPSE_KEY, state);\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Favorites persistence \u2500\u2500\nfunction _loadFavorites() {\n  return Storage.getJSON(FAVORITES_KEY, []);\n}\nfunction _saveFavorites(list) {\n  Storage.setJSON(FAVORITES_KEY, list);\n}\nfunction _isFavorite(mid) {\n  return _loadFavorites().includes(mid);\n}\nfunction _toggleFavorite(mid) {\n  const favs = _loadFavorites();\n  const idx = favs.indexOf(mid);\n  if (idx >= 0) favs.splice(idx, 1);\n  else favs.push(mid);\n  _saveFavorites(favs);\n  return idx < 0; // returns true if now favorited\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Usage tracking \u2500\u2500\nfunction _loadUsage() {\n  return Storage.getJSON(USAGE_KEY, {});\n}\nfunction _trackUsage(mid) {\n  const usage = _loadUsage();\n  if (!usage[mid]) usage[mid] = { count: 0, last: 0 };\n  usage[mid].count++;\n  usage[mid].last = Date.now();\n  Storage.setJSON(USAGE_KEY, usage);\n}\nfunction _getSortMode() {\n  return Storage.get(SORT_KEY, '');\n}\nfunction _setSortMode(mode) {\n  Storage.set(SORT_KEY, mode);\n}\n\n/**\n * Build a single model row element.\n */\nfunction _startChat(url, mid, endpointId) {\n  // Block model switching while compare mode is active\n  if (window.compareModule && window.compareModule.isActive()) return;\n  _trackUsage(mid);\n  if (sessionModule) {\n    sessionModule.createDirectChat(url, mid, endpointId);\n  } else if (uiModule) {\n    uiModule.showError('Session module not loaded');\n  }\n}\n\nfunction _buildModelRow(mid, url, displayName, endpointId, offline, modelType) {\n  const row = document.createElement('div');\n  row.className = 'models-row' + (offline ? ' models-row-offline' : '');\n  row.setAttribute('data-model-id', mid);\n  if (modelType === 'image') row.setAttribute('data-model-type', 'image');\n\n  const handle = document.createElement('span');\n  handle.className = 'item-drag-handle';\n  handle.textContent = '\\u22EE\\u22EE';\n  handle.title = 'Drag to reorder';\n  row.appendChild(handle);\n\n  // Favorite indicator \u2014 provider logo or colored dot\n  const fav = document.createElement('span');\n  const _favColor = modelColor(mid);\n  const _logo = providerLogo(mid);\n  if (_logo) {\n    fav.className = 'model-fav-btn provider-logo' + (_isFavorite(mid) ? ' active' : '');\n    fav.innerHTML = _logo;\n    fav.style.opacity = '0.4';\n  } else {\n    fav.className = 'model-fav-btn' + (_isFavorite(mid) ? ' active' : '');\n  }\n  fav.title = 'Toggle favorite';\n  fav.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    const nowFav = _toggleFavorite(mid);\n    fav.classList.toggle('active', nowFav);\n    uiModule.showToast(nowFav ? 'Favorited' : 'Unfavorited');\n    refreshModels();\n  });\n  const span = document.createElement('span');\n  span.className = 'grow';\n  span.textContent = displayName.split('/').pop();\n  if (modelType === 'image') {\n    const badge = document.createElement('span');\n    badge.className = 'model-type-badge';\n    badge.textContent = 'IMG';\n    badge.title = 'Image generation model';\n    badge.style.cssText = 'font-size:0.65em;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--accent,#7c3aed);color:#fff;margin-left:6px;vertical-align:middle;';\n    span.appendChild(badge);\n  }\n\n  const btn = document.createElement('button');\n  btn.type = 'button';\n  btn.textContent = offline ? 'Offline' : (modelType === 'image' ? '+ Image' : '+ Chat');\n  btn.className = 'model-chat-btn';\n  btn.style.transition = 'all 0.2s ease';\n  if (offline) {\n    btn.disabled = true;\n    btn.style.opacity = '0.4';\n    btn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';\n  } else {\n    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      e.stopPropagation();\n      _startChat(url, mid, endpointId);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Clicking anywhere on the row (except drag handle and fav) starts a chat\n  if (!offline) {\n    let _touchMoved = false;\n    row.addEventListener('touchstart', () => { _touchMoved = false; }, { passive: true });\n    row.addEventListener('touchmove', () => { _touchMoved = true; }, { passive: true });\n    row.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      if (e.target.closest('.item-drag-handle') || e.target.closest('.model-fav-btn')) return;\n      if (_touchMoved) { _touchMoved = false; return; }\n      _startChat(url, mid, endpointId);\n    });\n  }\n\n  row.appendChild(fav);\n  row.appendChild(span);\n  row.appendChild(btn);\n  return row;\n}\n\nexport async function refreshModels(force = false) {\n  const box = document.getElementById('models');\n  if (!box) return;\n\n  // Skip network fetch if cache is fresh and not forced \u2014 still re-render UI\n  const now = Date.now();\n  const needsFetch = force || _cachedItems.length === 0 || (now - _lastFetchTime) >= _FETCH_CACHE_TTL;\n\n  box.innerHTML = '';\n  if (needsFetch) {\n    const _loadingSpinner = spinnerModule.create('', 'right', 'wave');\n    box.appendChild(_loadingSpinner.createElement());\n    _loadingSpinner.start();\n    try {\n      if (!_fetchInflight) {\n        // Pass ?refresh=true on forced refreshes so the BACKEND's 30s\n        // per-user cache also gets bypassed. Without this, `force=true`\n        // only clears the frontend cache and the same stale list comes\n        // back \u2014 newly-served endpoints don't appear until the cache\n        // ages out. (Bug repro: serve a model, picker is empty for ~30s\n        // even though the endpoint is in the DB and online.)\n        const _url = `${API_BASE}/api/models` + (force ? '?refresh=true' : '');\n        _fetchInflight = fetch(_url, { credentials: 'same-origin' })\n          .then(async (res) => {\n            if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);\n            return res.json();\n          })\n          .finally(() => { _fetchInflight = null; });\n      }\n      const data = await _fetchInflight;\n      _lastFetchTime = Date.now();\n      _cachedItems = data.items || [];\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(e);\n      box.textContent = '(scan failed)';\n      return;\n    } finally {\n      box.innerHTML = '';\n    }\n  }\n  try {\n\n    const collapseState = _loadCollapsed();\n    let groupIdx = 0; // unique ID counter for drag-sort containers\n\n    // Collect models grouped by category \u2192 endpoint\n    const groups = { local: {}, api: {} };\n    // Also track extra (non-curated) models per endpoint\n    const extraGroups = { local: {}, api: {} };\n    if (_cachedItems && _cachedItems.length > 0) {\n      _cachedItems.forEach(item => {\n        const cat = item.category === 'local' ? 'local' : 'api';\n        const epName = item.endpoint_name || 'Unknown';\n        const isOffline = !!item.offline;\n        if (!groups[cat][epName]) groups[cat][epName] = [];\n        if (!extraGroups[cat][epName]) extraGroups[cat][epName] = [];\n        const displayNames = item.models_display || item.models || [];\n        const epModelType = item.model_type || 'llm';\n        (item.models || []).forEach((mid, i) => {\n          groups[cat][epName].push({\n            mid, url: item.url,\n            displayName: displayNames[i] || mid,\n            endpointId: item.endpoint_id || null,\n            offline: isOffline,\n            modelType: epModelType,\n          });\n        });\n        // Extra (non-curated) models from server\n        const extraDisplayNames = item.models_extra_display || item.models_extra || [];\n        (item.models_extra || []).forEach((mid, i) => {\n          extraGroups[cat][epName].push({\n            mid, url: item.url,\n            displayName: extraDisplayNames[i] || mid,\n            endpointId: item.endpoint_id || null,\n            offline: isOffline,\n            modelType: epModelType,\n          });\n        });\n      });\n    }\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Render Favorites section on top \u2500\u2500\n    const favs = _loadFavorites();\n    if (favs.length > 0) {\n      const favModels = [];\n      // Collect favorited models from all groups (keep them in originals too)\n      for (const cat of ['local', 'api']) {\n        for (const [epName, epModels] of Object.entries(groups[cat])) {\n          for (const m of epModels) {\n            if (favs.includes(m.mid)) {\n              favModels.push(m);\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "c66876ce0a70af738e4c24581b065c77d8bb65ed", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/models.js", "display_title": "models.js"}

> {"content": "// ============================================\n// Sidebar Layout \u2014 icon rail, hamburger cycling, mobile backdrop & swipe\n// ============================================\n\nlet _syncRailSideFn = null;\n\n/**\n * Get the current syncRailSide function reference.\n * Needed because it gets patched after initial setup.\n */\nexport function syncRailSide() {\n  if (_syncRailSideFn) _syncRailSideFn();\n}\n\n/**\n * Initialize sidebar layout: icon rail, hamburger cycling, mobile backdrop, swipe gestures.\n * @param {Object} Storage - Storage module\n * @param {Object} opts\n * @param {Object} opts.documentModule - Document module (for swapSide)\n * @param {Function} opts._closeCompareIfActive\n * @param {Function} opts._deactivateIncognito\n * @param {Object} opts.presetsModule\n * @param {Object} opts.sessionModule\n * @param {Function} opts.el - Element lookup helper\n * @param {*} opts._defaultChat - Default chat config\n * @param {Function} opts._syncResearchIndicator\n */\nexport function initSidebarLayout(Storage, opts) {\n  const {\n    documentModule, _closeCompareIfActive, _deactivateIncognito,\n    presetsModule, sessionModule, el, _defaultChat, _syncResearchIndicator\n  } = opts;\n\n  // \u2500\u2500 Icon rail + sidebar toggle \u2500\u2500\n  const iconRail = document.getElementById('icon-rail');\n  const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburger-btn');\n\n  function _syncRailSideCore() {\n    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n    if (!iconRail) return;\n    const isRight = sidebar.classList.contains('right-side');\n    const sidebarHidden = sidebar.classList.contains('hidden');\n    const railHidden = iconRail.classList.contains('rail-hidden');\n    const isMobileMini = iconRail.classList.contains('mobile-mini');\n    iconRail.classList.toggle('right-side', isRight);\n    // On mobile mini mode, JS already set inline styles \u2014 don't touch\n    if (isMobileMini) {\n      // Just update side positioning\n      if (isRight) {\n        iconRail.style.left = 'auto';\n        iconRail.style.right = '0';\n      } else {\n        iconRail.style.left = '0';\n        iconRail.style.right = 'auto';\n      }\n    } else {\n      iconRail.style.display = (sidebarHidden && !railHidden) ? '' : 'none';\n    }\n    // Hamburger is always visible \u2014 just update body classes for CSS layout adjustments\n    if (hamburgerBtn) {\n      document.body.classList.toggle('hamburger-right', isRight);\n      document.body.classList.toggle('hamburger-left', !isRight);\n      document.body.classList.toggle('hamburger-only', sidebarHidden && railHidden);\n      document.body.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed', sidebarHidden);\n    }\n    // Keep incognito button clear of hamburger\n    const incogBtn = document.getElementById('incognito-btn');\n    if (incogBtn) {\n      if (isRight && sidebarHidden) {\n        incogBtn.style.right = '48px';\n      } else {\n        incogBtn.style.right = '';\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Set initial reference and expose globally\n  _syncRailSideFn = _syncRailSideCore;\n  window.syncRailSide = syncRailSide;\n\n  // Restore sidebar side preference\n  if (Storage.get(Storage.KEYS.SIDEBAR_SIDE) === 'right') {\n    document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.add('right-side');\n  }\n  syncRailSide();\n\n  // In-sidebar toggle button \u2014 same behavior as hamburger\n  const sidebarToggleBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-toggle-btn');\n  if (sidebarToggleBtn) {\n    sidebarToggleBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      if (hamburgerBtn) hamburgerBtn.click();\n    });\n  }\n\n  // New chat buttons \u2014 same as clicking brand\n  const chatNewBtn = document.getElementById('chat-new-btn');\n  const sidebarNewChat = document.getElementById('sidebar-new-chat-btn');\n  [chatNewBtn, sidebarNewChat].forEach(btn => {\n    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n      const brandBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-brand-btn');\n      if (brandBtn) brandBtn.click();\n    });\n  });\n\n  // Hamburger cycles: full sidebar \u2192 mini \u2192 off \u2192 full\n  // Shift-click swaps sidebar side\n  let _userToggledSidebar = false;\n  let _wasAutoCollapsed = false;\n\n  // Deliberate \"open the sidebar\" used by the mobile swipe gesture (wired at\n  // module scope). It MUST set _userToggledSidebar so the auto-collapse\n  // MutationObserver doesn't immediately re-hide it (the swipe was opening it,\n  // then checkSidebarAutoCollapse re-added .hidden because this flag was unset\n  // \u2014 looked like nothing happened). Mirrors the hamburger's mobile-open path.\n  window._odyOpenSidebar = function(side) {\n    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n    if (!sidebar) return;\n    // On mobile, never open the sidebar while Compare is running \u2014 the panes\n    // own the screen and stray gestures (swipe, dragging a dock chip to the X)\n    // were popping it open. Blocking the open helper covers every path.\n    const cc = document.getElementById('chat-container');\n    if (window.innerWidth < 768 && cc && cc.classList.contains('compare-active')) return;\n    _userToggledSidebar = true;\n    // Optionally place the sidebar on a specific edge (the swipe gesture passes\n    // the direction). Persist it + re-anchor the doc panel, same as a\n    // shift-click on the hamburger.\n    if (side === 'left' || side === 'right') {\n      const wantRight = side === 'right';\n      if (sidebar.classList.contains('right-side') !== wantRight) {\n        sidebar.classList.toggle('right-side', wantRight);\n        try { Storage.set(Storage.KEYS.SIDEBAR_SIDE, side); } catch (_) {}\n        if (documentModule && documentModule.swapSide) { try { documentModule.swapSide(); } catch (_) {} }\n      }\n    }\n    const backdrop = document.getElementById('sidebar-backdrop');\n    if (window.innerWidth < 768 && iconRail) { iconRail.classList.remove('mobile-mini'); iconRail.style.cssText = ''; }\n    sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n    if (backdrop && window.innerWidth < 768) backdrop.classList.add('visible');\n    syncRailSide();\n  };\n\n  if (hamburgerBtn) {\n    hamburgerBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      e.stopPropagation();\n      const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n      if (e.shiftKey) {\n        sidebar.classList.toggle('right-side');\n        Storage.set(Storage.KEYS.SIDEBAR_SIDE, sidebar.classList.contains('right-side') ? 'right' : 'left');\n        syncRailSide();\n        if (documentModule && documentModule.swapSide) documentModule.swapSide();\n        return;\n      }\n\n      _userToggledSidebar = true;\n      const isSidebarVisible = !sidebar.classList.contains('hidden');\n\n      if (window.innerWidth < 768) {\n        // Mobile: full sidebar \u2194 hidden \u2014 simple toggle, no mini rail\n        const backdrop = document.getElementById('sidebar-backdrop');\n        if (iconRail) { iconRail.classList.remove('mobile-mini'); iconRail.style.cssText = ''; }\n\n        if (isSidebarVisible) {\n          // Closing sidebar\n          sidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n          if (backdrop) backdrop.classList.remove('visible');\n        } else {\n          // Mobile: the hamburger always opens the sidebar from the RIGHT.\n          // (Not persisted \u2014 keeps the desktop side preference untouched.)\n          if (!sidebar.classList.contains('right-side')) {\n            sidebar.classList.add('right-side');\n            if (documentModule && documentModule.swapSide) { try { documentModule.swapSide(); } catch (_) {} }\n          }\n          // Opening sidebar \u2014 blur keyboard first, then open after layout settles\n          if (document.activeElement && document.activeElement !== document.body\n              && (document.activeElement.tagName === 'INPUT' || document.activeElement.tagName === 'TEXTAREA')) {\n            document.activeElement.blur();\n            // Wait for keyboard dismiss to settle, then open\n            setTimeout(() => {\n              sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n              if (backdrop) backdrop.classList.add('visible');\n              syncRailSide();\n            }, 250);\n          } else {\n            sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n            if (backdrop) backdrop.classList.add('visible');\n          }\n        }\n        syncRailSide();\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Desktop: full sidebar \u2194 mini (icon rail) \u2014 simple toggle\n      if (isSidebarVisible) {\n        sidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n      } else {\n        _wasAutoCollapsed = false;\n        iconRail.classList.remove('rail-hidden');\n        sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n      }\n      syncRailSide();\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Icon rail section clicks \u2014 open sidebar and scroll to section\n  if (iconRail) {\n    iconRail.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      const btn = e.target.closest('.icon-rail-btn');\n      if (!btn || btn.id === 'rail-new-session' || btn.id === 'rail-delete-session' || btn.id === 'rail-search-btn' || btn.id === 'rail-settings' || btn.id === 'rail-admin') return;\n      const sectionId = btn.dataset.section;\n      if (!sectionId) return;\n      const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n      sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n      syncRailSide();\n      const section = document.getElementById(sectionId);\n      if (section) {\n        section.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });\n        section.classList.remove('collapsed');\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Auto-collapse sidebar when window gets small or chat area is squeezed\n  const AUTO_COLLAPSE_WIDTH = 700;\n  const MIN_CHAT_WIDTH = 380; // collapse sidebar if chat gets narrower than this\n\n  function checkSidebarAutoCollapse() {\n    if (_userToggledSidebar) return;\n    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n    if (!sidebar) return;\n    const isHidden = sidebar.classList.contains('hidden');\n\n    // Check if chat area is too narrow (e.g. sidebar + doc panel both open).\n    // BUT \u2014 if a tile-snapped modal exists, IT is what's making chat narrow,\n    // and that's the user's explicit choice. Don't auto-collapse the sidebar\n    // in response, or we get a reactive loop: snap \u2192 narrow chat \u2192 hide\n    // sidebar \u2192 safe-rect changes \u2192 reclamp modal \u2192 new chat width \u2192 ...\n    const chatContainer = document.querySelector('.chat-container');\n    const hasTileSnapped = document.querySelector('.modal-content[data-_tile-zone], .research-pane[data-_tile-zone]');\n    const chatTooNarrow = chatContainer && chatContainer.offsetWidth < MIN_CHAT_WIDTH && !isHidden && !hasTileSnapped;\n\n    if ((window.innerWidth < AUTO_COLLAPSE_WIDTH || chatTooNarrow) && !isHidden) {\n      sidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n      _wasAutoCollapsed = true;\n      syncRailSide();\n    } else if (window.innerWidth >= AUTO_COLLAPSE_WIDTH && isHidden && _wasAutoCollapsed) {\n      // Only restore if chat won't be too narrow\n      sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n      void document.body.offsetWidth; // reflow\n      if (chatContainer && chatContainer.offsetWidth < MIN_CHAT_WIDTH) {\n        sidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n      } else {\n        _wasAutoCollapsed = false;\n      }\n      syncRailSide();\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {\n    _userToggledSidebar = false; // allow auto-collapse on actual resize\n    requestAnimationFrame(checkSidebarAutoCollapse);", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "9135e93ba10e58cb9f86de98f26f8d7382130dc1", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/sidebar-layout.js", "display_title": "sidebar-layout.js"}
