> {"content": "// ============================================\n// COOKBOOK RUNNING SUB-MODULE\n// Running tasks tab: task cards, status monitoring,\n// stop/restart, diagnosis, auto-fix, background monitor\n// ============================================\n\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport { _diagnose, _showDiagnosis, _clearDiagnosis } from './cookbook-diagnosis.js';\nimport { registerMenuDismiss } from './escMenuStack.js';\nimport { computeProgressSignal } from './cookbookProgressSignal.js';\n\n// Human-friendly badge label for a task's internal status. Avoids surfacing\n// the word \"error\" in the sidebar \u2014 a server the user stopped or one that\n// quit cleanly reads as \"stopped\", not \"error\".\nfunction _statusLabel(status, type) {\n  if (status === 'running' && type === 'download') return 'downloading';\n  if (status === 'done' && type === 'download') return 'finished';\n  if (status === 'error') return 'stopped';\n  return status || '';\n}\n\n// Single source of truth for what a task's status badge shows + its style class.\n// Crucially, a serve task that's still coming up shows its live phase\n// (\"loading 45%\", \"warming up\", \u2026) rather than the generic \"running\" \u2014 they're\n// the same state, so the badge shouldn't flip between two different labels on\n// every re-render. Returns { text, cls } where cls is appended after\n// \"cookbook-task-status\" ('' = the neutral loading style).\nfunction _taskBadge(task) {\n  if (task._unreachable && task.status === 'running') return { text: 'unreachable', cls: 'cookbook-task-error' };\n  if (task.type === 'serve' && task.status === 'running' && task.progress) {\n    // Same green \"running\" pill \u2014 just with dynamic phase text, so it doesn't\n    // read as a different status while the server is coming up.\n    return { text: task.progress, cls: 'cookbook-task-running' };\n  }\n  return { text: _statusLabel(task.status, task.type), cls: 'cookbook-task-' + task.status };\n}\n\n// A download task whose tmux output still shows an active per-shard line\n// (e.g. \"model-00012-of-00082.safetensors: 56%|\") is NOT actually finished \u2014\n// the cookbook just lost track. The clear pill becomes a \"reconnect\" affordance\n// in that case (click \u2192 revive the row + reattach the poll loop).\nfunction _downloadOutputLooksActive(task) {\n  if (!task || task.type !== 'download') return false;\n  const out = task.output || '';\n  if (!out) return false;\n  if (out.includes('DOWNLOAD_OK') || out.includes('DOWNLOAD_FAILED')) return false;\n  // An active shard line: filename + a colon + a percentage that isn't 100%.\n  // We catch any in-flight shard or \"Downloading 'X' to ...\" line (no %).\n  return /model-\\d+-of-\\d+\\.[a-z]+:\\s+(?!100%)\\d+%/i.test(out)\n      || /Downloading\\s+'[^']+'\\s+to\\s+'[^']*\\.incomplete'/i.test(out);\n}\n\nfunction _canClearTask(task) {\n  if (!task || task.status === 'running') return false;\n  if (task.type === 'serve' && (task.status === 'ready' || task._serveReady)) return false;\n  // If the tmux output still shows an in-flight download, the task isn't\n  // actually finished \u2014 hide the clear/check pill so it doesn't show on a\n  // task that's still doing work. (The next render will reflect this and\n  // ideally the self-heal flips status back to running.)\n  if (_downloadOutputLooksActive(task)) return false;\n  return ['done', 'stopped', 'error', 'crashed', 'failed'].includes(task.status);\n}\n\nfunction _clearPillLabel(task) {\n  if (_downloadOutputLooksActive(task)) return 'reconnect';\n  return 'clear';\n}\n\n// A pip dependency/driver install (payload._dep) reports success with the\n// runner's \"=== Process exited with code 0 ===\" sentinel and pip's\n// \"Successfully installed\" line \u2014 never the HuggingFace download markers\n// (DONE / 100% / /snapshots/ / DOWNLOAD_OK) that the download heuristics look\n// for. Without this, a clean install whose tmux pane has already gone away is\n// misread as crashed/stopped even though pip exited 0. Prefer the authoritative\n// exit-code sentinel; fall back to pip's success line when no sentinel was\n// captured (and there's no install error in the same output).\nfunction _depInstallSucceeded(output) {\n  const text = String(output || '');\n  if (!text) return false;\n  const exitMatch = text.match(/=== Process exited with code (-?\\d+) ===/);\n  if (exitMatch) return Number(exitMatch[1]) === 0;\n  return /\\b(?:Successfully installed|Requirement already satisfied)\\b/.test(text)\n    && !/\\bERROR\\b|No matching distribution|Could not find a version|Traceback \\(most recent call last\\)/.test(text);\n}\n\nfunction _shouldOfferCrashReport(task) {\n  if (!task) return false;\n  if (task._unreachable && task.type === 'serve') return true;\n  return ['error', 'crashed', 'failed'].includes(task.status);\n}\n\nfunction _serveTaskLooksAwqOnLocalBackend(task, outputText = '') {\n  const repo = `${task?.payload?.repo_id || ''} ${task?.name || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n  const cmd = `${task?.payload?._cmd || ''} ${outputText || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n  return /\\b(awq|gptq|fp8)\\b/.test(repo) && /(llama-server|llama_cpp\\.server|ollama|ggml_cuda_enable_unified_memory)/.test(cmd);\n}\n\nfunction _serveTaskLooksAwqWithoutUsableAccelerator(task, outputText = '') {\n  const repo = `${task?.payload?.repo_id || ''} ${task?.name || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n  const out = String(outputText || '').toLowerCase();\n  return /\\b(awq|gptq|fp8)\\b/.test(repo)\n    && /(no accelerator|no cuda runtime|failed to infer device type|triton is not supported|0 active driver)/i.test(out);\n}\n\nasync function _openDownloadForGgufTask(task) {\n  const raw = task?.payload?.repo_id || task?.name || '';\n  const modelName = String(raw)\n    .split('/').pop()\n    .replace(/[-_](?:AWQ|GPTQ|FP8|4bit|8bit|Int4|Int8).*$/i, '')\n    .replace(/[-_]+$/g, '')\n    || String(raw).split('/').pop()\n    || raw;\n  const cookbook = window.cookbookModule;\n  if (cookbook && typeof cookbook.open === 'function') {\n    cookbook.open({ tab: 'Search' });\n  } else {\n    document.getElementById('tool-cookbook-btn')?.click();\n  }\n  setTimeout(async () => {\n    const modal = document.getElementById('cookbook-modal');\n    const tab = modal?.querySelector('.cookbook-tab[data-backend=\"Search\"]');\n    if (tab && !tab.classList.contains('active')) tab.click();\n    const search = document.getElementById('hwfit-search');\n    if (search) {\n      search.value = modelName;\n      search.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));\n      search.focus();\n    }\n    const quant = document.getElementById('hwfit-quant');\n    if (quant) {\n      quant.value = 'Q4_K_M';\n      quant.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\n    }\n    try {\n      const hwfit = await import('./cookbook-hwfit.js');\n      if (typeof hwfit._hwfitFetch === 'function') hwfit._hwfitFetch(true);\n    } catch {}\n  }, 80);\n}\n\nfunction _terminalServeDiagnosis(task, outputText) {\n  const out = String(outputText || task?.output || '');\n  if (!task || task.type !== 'serve' || !['stopped', 'error', 'crashed', 'failed'].includes(task.status) || !out.trim()) return null;\n  // Pip tasks (Reinstall vLLM, Upgrade torch, etc.) ride on the serve task\n  // type so they get a tmux session + show up in Running tab \u2014 but they are\n  // NOT serve invocations. Their output is pip's own; the generic\n  // \"Serve stopped before the model became reachable\" message + Edit-serve\n  // fix make no sense. Bail so the panel just shows pip's output.\n  const _isPipTask = ((task.payload?.repo_id || '').startsWith('pip-'))\n    || /python3? -m pip\\b/.test(task.payload?._cmd || '');\n  if (_isPipTask) return null;\n  if (_serveTaskLooksAwqOnLocalBackend(task, out)) {\n    return {\n      message: 'AWQ/GPTQ/FP8 cannot be served through llama.cpp/Ollama unified-memory mode.',\n      suggestion: 'Suggested action: use vLLM/SGLang on a compatible CUDA/ROCm GPU server, or download a GGUF version for llama.cpp/Ollama/unified-memory serving.',\n      fixes: [\n        { label: 'Find GGUF download', action: () => _openDownloadForGgufTask(task) },\n        { label: 'Edit serve', action: (panel) => _openServeEditForTask(task) },\n      ],\n    };\n  }\n  if (_serveTaskLooksAwqWithoutUsableAccelerator(task, out)) {\n    return {\n      message: 'AWQ/GPTQ/FP8 needs a working vLLM/SGLang accelerator path; this server did not expose one.',\n      suggestion: 'Suggested action: choose a CUDA/ROCm server where vLLM/SGLang can see the GPU, or download a GGUF version and serve it with llama.cpp/Ollama.',\n      fixes: [\n        { label: 'Find GGUF download', action: () => _openDownloadForGgufTask(task) },\n        { label: 'Edit serve', action: (panel) => _openServeEditForTask(task) },\n      ],\n    };\n  }\n  return _diagnose(out) || {\n    message: /Native llama-server not found|building llama-server|llama\\.cpp/i.test(out)\n      ? 'llama.cpp build stopped before the server became reachable.'\n      : 'Serve stopped before the model became reachable.',\n    suggestion: /Native llama-server not found|building llama-server|llama\\.cpp/i.test(out)\n      ? 'Suggested action: copy the troubleshooting bundle, then edit serve settings. For the quickest local/CPU path, use Ollama or a prebuilt llama-server; source builds can take several minutes and fail if build dependencies are incomplete.'\n      : 'Suggested action: copy the troubleshooting bundle, then edit serve settings or relaunch with a CPU/backend fallback.',\n    fixes: [{ label: 'Edit serve', action: (panel) => _openServeEditForTask(task) }],\n  };\n}\n\nfunction _redactCrashReportText(text) {\n  if (!text) return '';\n  return String(text)\n    .replace(/\\b(Bearer\\s+)[A-Za-z0-9._~+/=-]{12,}/gi, '$1[redacted]')\n    .replace(/\\b(hf_[A-Za-z0-9]{16,})\\b/g, '[redacted-hf-token]')\n    .replace(/\\b(sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{16,})\\b/g, '[redacted-api-key]')\n    .replace(/\\b(xox[baprs]-[A-Za-z0-9-]{16,})\\b/g, '[redacted-slack-token]')\n    .replace(/\\b(AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{20,})\\b/g, '[redacted-google-key]')\n    .replace(/\\b((?:HF_TOKEN|HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN|OPENAI_API_KEY|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|BRAVE_API_KEY|TAVILY_API_KEY|SERPER_API_KEY|GOOGLE_API_KEY|API_KEY|TOKEN|PASSWORD)\\s*=\\s*)(['\"]?)[^\\s'\"\\\\]+/gi, '$1$2[redacted]')\n    .replace(/\\b(--(?:api-key|token|hf-token|password)\\s+)([^\\s]+)/gi, '$1[redacted]');\n}\n\nfunction _lastLines(text, count = 160) {\n  const clean = _redactCrashReportText(text || '').trimEnd();\n  if (!clean) return '(no captured output)';\n  return clean.split('\\n').slice(-count).join('\\n');\n}\n\nfunction _codeFence(text) {\n  return String(text || '').replace(/```/g, '` ` `');\n}\n\nfunction _taskHostLabel(task) {\n  if (!task?.remoteHost) return 'local';\n  return task.remoteHost + (task.sshPort ? `:${task.sshPort}` : '');\n}\n\nfunction _taskPort(task) {\n  const cmd = task?.payload?._cmd || '';\n  const match = cmd.match(/--port\\s+(\\d+)/);\n  return match ? match[1] : '';\n}\n\nfunction _buildCrashReport(task, outputText) {\n  const capturedOutput = outputText || task?.output || '';\n  const cmd = _redactCrashReportText(task?.payload?._cmd || '');\n  const diag = _diagnose(capturedOutput);\n  const started = task?.ts ? new Date(task.ts).toISOString() : '';\n  const report = [\n    '## Odysseus Cookbook crash report',\n    '',\n    'Please review this report for secrets before posting it publicly.',\n    '',\n    '### Task',\n    `- ID: \\`${task?.sessionId || task?.id || 'unknown'}\\``,\n    `- Type: \\`${task?.type || 'unknown'}\\``,\n    `- Status: \\`${task?._unreachable ? 'unreachable' : (task?.status || 'unknown')}\\``,\n    `- Model/repo: \\`${task?.payload?.repo_id || task?.name || 'unknown'}\\``,\n    `- Host: \\`${_taskHostLabel(task)}\\``,\n  ];\n  if (task?.platform) report.push(`- Platform: \\`${task.platform}\\``);\n  if (started) report.push(`- Started: \\`${started}\\``);\n  const port = _taskPort(task);\n  if (port) report.push(`- Port: \\`${port}\\``);\n  if (diag?.message) report.push(`- Diagnosis: ${diag.message}`);\n  if (cmd) {\n    report.push('', '### Command', '```bash', _codeFence(cmd), '```');\n  }\n  report.push('', '### Last captured output', '```text', _codeFence(_lastLines(capturedOutput)), '```');\n  return report.join('\\n');\n}\n\n// Shared state/functions injected by init()\nlet _envState;\nlet _sshCmd;\nlet _getPort;\nlet _sshPrefix;\nlet _getPlatform;\nlet _isWindows;\nlet _buildEnvPrefix;\nlet _loadPresets;\nlet _savePresets;\nlet _copyText;\nlet _persistEnvState;\nlet _refreshDependencies;\nlet _serverByVal;\nlet _selectedServer;\nlet modelLogo;", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "06b557c1c030f25bf1a2a215f073d06e5c6bcc74", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/cookbookRunning.js", "display_title": "cookbookRunning.js"}

> {"content": "// ============================================\n// COOKBOOK HWFIT SUB-MODULE\n// \"What Fits?\" hardware model fitting UI\n// ============================================\n\nimport {\n  _envState,\n  _persistEnvState,\n  esc,\n  modelLogo,\n  _detectBackend,\n  _runModelDownload,\n  _runPanelCmd,\n  _buildDownloadCmd,\n  _addTask,\n  _renderRunningTab,\n  _detectToolParser,\n  _lastCacheHost,\n  _setLastCacheHost,\n  _serverByVal,\n  _serverKey,\n  _currentServerValue,\n  _shellQuote,\n  _MODELDIR_CHECK_ON,\n  _MODELDIR_CHECK_OFF,\n  _serverEntryHtml,\n  _copyText,\n  // Import cookbook.js WITHOUT a ?v= query \u2014 the same plain specifier every other\n  // importer uses. A query mismatch loads cookbook.js twice as two separate modules\n  // (two _envState objects), which silently sent downloads to the wrong server.\n} from './cookbook.js';\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './spinner.js';\n\n// \u2500\u2500 What Fits? (hardware model fitting) \u2500\u2500\n\nexport let _hwfitCache = null;\nexport let _hwfitDebounce = null;\nexport let _cachedModelIds = null; // repo IDs already downloaded\n// Bumped on every _hwfitFetch; a slow scan (remote SSH probe can take ~10s)\n// checks this before rendering so a stale response can't clobber a newer one\n// after the user has switched servers.\nlet _hwfitFetchToken = 0;\nlet _dismissedHwChips = new Set();\n// Permanently removed (X-clicked) chips. Separate from _dismissedHwChips\n// so the ranker treats \"off\" and \"removed\" the same (both ignore the\n// hardware) but the UI keeps \"off\" chips visible to toggle back on,\n// while \"removed\" ones don't render at all until next rescan.\nlet _removedHwChips = new Set();\n\nexport let _gpuToggleTotal = 0; // real GPU count from first scan, never overridden\n\nfunction _firstGgufSource(model) {\n  const sources = Array.isArray(model?.gguf_sources) ? model.gguf_sources : [];\n  return sources.find(src => src && src.repo) || null;\n}\n\nfunction _looksLikeGgufRepo(model) {\n  const haystack = `${model?.quant_repo || ''} ${model?.repo_id || ''} ${model?.path || ''} ${model?.name || ''}`.toLowerCase();\n  return !!model?.is_gguf || haystack.includes('gguf') || haystack.includes('.gguf');\n}\n\nfunction _downloadSourceRepo(model, backend) {\n  if (backend === 'llamacpp') {\n    const ggufSource = _firstGgufSource(model);\n    if (ggufSource) return { repo: ggufSource.repo, kind: 'GGUF' };\n    if (_looksLikeGgufRepo(model)) {\n      const repo = model?.quant_repo || model?.repo_id || model?.name;\n      if (repo) return { repo, kind: 'GGUF' };\n    }\n  }\n  return { repo: model?.quant_repo || model?.name || '', kind: '' };\n}\n\n// Reset GPU-toggle state so the next scan re-renders the RAM/GPU buttons for a\n// (possibly different) server, WITHOUT clearing the markup now \u2014 clearing it made\n// the buttons flicker out and back in. The old buttons stay visible until the\n// fresh scan returns and swaps them in place. Lives here (not cookbook.js) because\n// _gpuToggleTotal is a module-local binding that can't be reassigned by importers.\nexport function _resetGpuToggleState(clearDismissed = true) {\n  if (clearDismissed) {\n    _dismissedHwChips = new Set();\n    _removedHwChips = new Set();\n  }\n  const tc = document.getElementById('hwfit-gpu-toggles');\n  if (tc) {\n    tc._originalSystem = null;\n    tc._activeCount = undefined;\n    tc._activeGroup = undefined;\n    tc._groups = null;\n    tc._builtGroup = undefined;\n    delete tc.dataset.rendered;\n  }\n  _gpuToggleTotal = 0;\n}\n\n// Trim vendor noise so a pool label reads \"RTX 4090 D\" not \"NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 D\".\nfunction _shortGpuName(name) {\n  return String(name || 'GPU')\n    .replace(/^NVIDIA\\s+GeForce\\s+/i, '')\n    .replace(/^NVIDIA\\s+/i, '')\n    .replace(/^AMD\\s+(Radeon\\s+)?/i, '')\n    .trim() || 'GPU';\n}\n\n// Powers of two up to the pool size, plus the exact pool size \u2014 these are the\n// only safe vLLM --tensor-parallel-size values (TP must divide the GPU count and\n// the model's attention heads). Never offer a count we can't actually serve.\nfunction _validTpCounts(poolSize) {\n  const out = [1, 2, 4, 8, 16].filter(n => n <= poolSize);\n  if (poolSize > 0 && !out.includes(poolSize)) out.push(poolSize);\n  return out;\n}\n\nexport function _renderGpuToggles(system) {\n  const container = document.getElementById('hwfit-gpu-toggles');\n  if (!container) return;\n  const groups = Array.isArray(system.gpu_groups) ? system.gpu_groups : [];\n  // Box-wide GPU total, stable across fetches. The route shrinks system.gpu_count\n  // to the *active pool* once we pin one, so derive the total from the (immutable)\n  // group list or the raw detection, never from the possibly-overridden count.\n  const total = system.detected_gpu_count\n    || (groups.length ? groups.reduce((s, g) => s + (g.count || 0), 0) : (system.gpu_count || 0));\n  if (total <= 0 && !system.has_gpu) {\n    container.innerHTML = '';\n    container._groups = null;\n    _gpuToggleTotal = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n  if (!_gpuToggleTotal) _gpuToggleTotal = total;\n\n  container._groups = groups;\n  if (container._activeGroup === undefined) container._activeGroup = 0;  // auto = largest pool\n  const heterogeneous = groups.length > 1;\n\n  // Rebuild only when the hardware shape changes OR the chosen pool changes (the\n  // count buttons are pool-specific). Otherwise a re-scan would flicker them.\n  const sig = `${total}|${groups.map(g => g.count + ':' + g.vram_each).join(',')}`;\n  if (container.dataset.rendered === sig && container._builtGroup === container._activeGroup) return;\n  container.dataset.rendered = sig;\n  container._builtGroup = container._activeGroup;\n\n  const grp = groups[container._activeGroup] || groups[0]\n    || { count: total, vram_each: 0, name: system.gpu_name || 'GPU' };\n  const poolSize = grp.count || total;\n\n  let html = '';\n  if (heterogeneous) {\n    html += `<select class=\"hwfit-gpu-group\" id=\"hwfit-gpu-group\" title=\"Which GPU pool to serve from \u2014 vLLM can only tensor-parallel across identical GPUs\">`;\n    groups.forEach((g, i) => {\n      const lbl = `${g.count}\u00d7 ${_shortGpuName(g.name)} (${Math.round(g.vram_total)} GB)`;\n      html += `<option value=\"${i}\"${i === container._activeGroup ? ' selected' : ''}>${esc(lbl)}</option>`;\n    });\n    html += '</select>';\n  }\n  const validCounts = _validTpCounts(poolSize);\n  const maxGpu = validCounts.length ? validCounts[validCounts.length - 1] : 0;\n  // Commit the data layer to maxGpu on initial render so it matches the\n  // visual highlight. Before this, _activeCount stayed undefined \u2192 no\n  // gpu_count param sent \u2192 backend's fallback could rank against RAM on\n  // mixed-resource boxes (\"tightest\" sorted by RAM instead of GPU).\n  if (container._activeCount === undefined && validCounts.length) {\n    container._activeCount = maxGpu;\n  }\n  html += '<button class=\"hwfit-gpu-btn\" data-count=\"0\" title=\"CPU / RAM only\">RAM</button>';\n  const hasExplicitCount = typeof container._activeCount === 'number';\n  for (const n of validCounts) {\n    const text = n === 1 ? 'GPU' : n + ' GPU';\n    const isActive = hasExplicitCount && n === container._activeCount;\n    html += `<button class=\"hwfit-gpu-btn${isActive ? ' active' : ''}\" data-count=\"${n}\" title=\"${n} GPU${n > 1 ? 's' : ''}\">${text}</button>`;\n  }\n  // Also mark the RAM button active when the user explicitly chose RAM (0)\n  // \u2014 the loop above only handles GPU buttons.\n  if (container._activeCount === 0) {\n    const ramBtn = container.querySelector('.hwfit-gpu-btn[data-count=\"0\"]');\n    // (we just set innerHTML so we re-mark below after assignment)\n  }\n  container.innerHTML = html;\n  if (container._activeCount === 0) {\n    const ramBtn = container.querySelector('.hwfit-gpu-btn[data-count=\"0\"]');\n    if (ramBtn) ramBtn.classList.add('active');\n  }\n\n  // Pool dropdown: switch pools, reset the count to the new pool's max, rebuild.\n  const sel = container.querySelector('#hwfit-gpu-group');\n  if (sel) {\n    sel.addEventListener('change', () => {\n      container._activeGroup = parseInt(sel.value) || 0;\n      container._activeCount = undefined;   // default to the new pool's max\n      delete container.dataset.rendered;    // force a count-button rebuild\n      _renderGpuToggles(system);\n      _hwfitCache = null;\n      _hwfitFetch();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (!container._gpuBound) {\n    container._gpuBound = true;\n    container.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n      const btn = e.target.closest('.hwfit-gpu-btn');\n      if (!btn) return;\n      const count = parseInt(btn.dataset.count);\n      const wasActive = btn.classList.contains('active') && container._activeCount === count;\n      container.querySelectorAll('.hwfit-gpu-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));\n      if (wasActive) {\n        container._activeCount = null;\n      } else {\n        btn.classList.add('active');\n        container._activeCount = count;\n        // Auto-suggest a quant based on hardware selection \u2014 but ONLY when the\n        // user has already picked a specific quant. When they're on \"All\"\n        // (value === \"\"), leave them on All: toggling a GPU shouldn't silently\n        // yank them out of the All view they wanted to see.\n        const quantSel = document.getElementById('hwfit-quant');\n        if (quantSel && quantSel.value !== '') {\n          if (count <= 1) {\n            quantSel.value = 'Q4_K_M'; // RAM or 1 GPU -> Q4 sweet spot\n          } else if (String(system?.backend || '').toLowerCase() === 'rocm') {\n            quantSel.value = 'Q4_K_M'; // ROCm default stays GGUF/local-safe; AWQ is explicit only\n          } else {\n            quantSel.value = 'AWQ-4bit'; // Multi-GPU -> AWQ for vLLM\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      _hwfitCache = null;\n      _hwfitFetch();\n    });\n  }\n}\n\n// --- Scan persistence (survives page reloads) ----------------------------\n// The backend caches hardware detection per host (~30 min) but that's lost on a\n// service restart, and a reload still shows a spinner while it re-fetches. Cache\n// the last successful /models result per param-signature in localStorage so a\n// reload paints instantly, then we refresh in the background and swap.\nconst _SCAN_CACHE_KEY = 'hwfit_scan_cache_v1';\nconst _MANUAL_HW_KEY = 'hwfit_manual_hardware_v1';\nconst _CTX_KEY = 'hwfit_target_context_v1';\nconst _CTX_PRESETS = [8192, 16384, 32768, 50000, 131072, 0]; // 0 = model max\nconst _SCAN_CACHE_MAX = 12;            // keep the newest N signatures\nconst _SCAN_CACHE_TTL = 6 * 3600 * 1000; // 6 h \u2014 hardware rarely changes\n\n// Ctx slider helpers (ported from origin/main). The slider picks an INDEX into\n// _CTX_PRESETS; _ctxValue() resolves it to a token count (0 = \"Max\"). The label\n// next to the slider re-renders to \"8k\" / \"16k\" / \u2026 / \"Max\".\nfunction _ctxLabel(value) {\n  const n = Number(value) || 0;\n  if (!n) return 'Max';\n  return n >= 1000 ? Math.round(n / 1000) + 'k' : String(n);\n}\n\nfunction _ctxValue() {\n  const slider = document.getElementById('hwfit-context');\n  const idx = Math.max(0, Math.min(_CTX_PRESETS.length - 1, Number(slider?.value ?? 3) || 0));\n  return _CTX_PRESETS[idx] || 0;\n}\n\nfunction _syncCtxControl() {\n  const slider = document.getElementById('hwfit-context');\n  const label = document.getElementById('hwfit-context-label');\n  if (!slider) return;\n  const saved = localStorage.getItem(_CTX_KEY);\n  const savedIdx = saved == null ? 3 : _CTX_PRESETS.indexOf(Number(saved));\n  slider.value = String(savedIdx >= 0 ? savedIdx : 3);\n  if (label) label.textContent = _ctxLabel(_ctxValue());\n}\n\nfunction _manualHwState() {\n  try {\n    const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(_MANUAL_HW_KEY) || '{}');\n    if (s && (s.mode === 'gpu' || s.mode === 'ram')) return s;\n  } catch {}\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction _saveManualHwState(s) {\n  try {\n    if (!s || !s.mode) localStorage.removeItem(_MANUAL_HW_KEY);\n    else localStorage.setItem(_MANUAL_HW_KEY, JSON.stringify(s));\n  } catch {}", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "29feb9279b9052f88a0646c98133864159adc4b7", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/cookbook-hwfit.js", "display_title": "cookbook-hwfit.js"}

> {"content": "// static/js/settings.js \u2014 Settings panel module (ES6)\n// User-facing preferences: AI models, search, appearance\n\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport searchModule from './search.js';\nimport { makeWindowDraggable } from './windowDrag.js';\nimport { clearDockSide } from './modalSnap.js';\nimport { sortModelIds } from './modelSort.js';\nimport { isAltGrEvent } from './platform.js';\n\nlet initialized = false;\nlet modalEl = null;\n\nfunction el(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }\nfunction esc(s) { return uiModule.esc(s); }\nfunction safeRasterDataUrl(raw) {\n  const value = String(raw || '').trim();\n  return /^data:image\\/(?:png|jpe?g|gif|webp);base64,[a-z0-9+/=\\s]+$/i.test(value) ? value : '';\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Tab switching \u2500\u2500 */\nconst ADMIN_TABS = new Set(['services', 'integrations', 'tools', 'users', 'system']);\n\nfunction initTabs() {\n  modalEl.querySelectorAll('[data-settings-tab]').forEach(btn => {\n    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n      const tab = btn.dataset.settingsTab;\n      // Lazy-init admin when first clicking an admin tab\n      if (ADMIN_TABS.has(tab) && window.adminModule && typeof window.adminModule.open === 'function') {\n        window.adminModule.open(tab);\n        return;\n      }\n      modalEl.querySelectorAll('[data-settings-tab]').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.settingsTab === tab));\n      modalEl.querySelectorAll('[data-settings-panel]').forEach(p => p.classList.toggle('hidden', p.dataset.settingsPanel !== tab));\n      // Mark when the Appearance tab is open so the modal can go\n      // semi-transparent \u2014 lets the user see the rest of the UI react as\n      // they flip toggles instead of having to close + reopen the modal.\n      document.body.classList.toggle('settings-appearance-open', tab === 'appearance');\n      syncAppearanceOpacity(tab === 'appearance');\n      if (tab === 'ai') refreshAiModelEndpoints();\n    });\n  });\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Dragging \u2500\u2500 */\nfunction initDrag() {\n  const header = modalEl.querySelector('.modal-header');\n  const content = modalEl.querySelector('.settings-modal-content');\n  if (!header || !content) return;\n  // Skip interactive controls in the header (e.g. the opacity slider) so\n  // grabbing them doesn't start a window-drag.\n  makeWindowDraggable(modalEl, {\n    content,\n    header,\n    skipSelector: 'button, input, select, .theme-opacity-wrap',\n    enableDock: true,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction resetWindowPlacement() {\n  const content = modalEl && modalEl.querySelector('.settings-modal-content');\n  if (!content) return;\n  const hadLeft = modalEl.classList.contains('modal-left-docked');\n  const hadRight = modalEl.classList.contains('modal-right-docked');\n  modalEl.classList.remove('modal-left-docked', 'modal-right-docked');\n  if (hadLeft) clearDockSide('left', modalEl);\n  if (hadRight) clearDockSide('right', modalEl);\n  if (content._leftDockNavObs) {\n    try { content._leftDockNavObs.navObs && content._leftDockNavObs.navObs.disconnect(); } catch (_) {}\n    try { window.removeEventListener('resize', content._leftDockNavObs.reanchor); } catch (_) {}\n    delete content._leftDockNavObs;\n  }\n  delete content._preDockSnapshot;\n  delete content._dockSide;\n  delete content._dockSuspended;\n  delete content.dataset._tilePreSnap;\n  delete content.dataset._tileZone;\n  [\n    'position', 'left', 'top', 'right', 'bottom', 'margin', 'transform',\n    'width', 'height', 'max-width', 'max-height', 'border-radius', 'transition',\n  ].forEach(prop => content.style.removeProperty(prop));\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Close on backdrop / X \u2500\u2500 */\nfunction initClose() {\n  modalEl.querySelector('.close-btn').addEventListener('click', close);\n  modalEl.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {\n    if (uiModule.isTouchInsideModal()) return;\n    if (e.target === modalEl) close();\n  });\n  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n    if (e.key !== 'Escape' || !modalEl || modalEl.classList.contains('hidden')) return;\n    // If an integration edit/add form is open inside the modal, close\n    // just that \u2014 don't dismiss the whole settings modal. (Pressing\n    // ESC mid-edit and losing the modal was a fast-typing footgun.)\n    const innerForm = modalEl.querySelector('#unified-intg-form, #set-email-accounts-form');\n    if (innerForm && innerForm.style.display !== 'none' && innerForm.children.length > 0) {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      e.stopPropagation();\n      innerForm.style.display = 'none';\n      innerForm.innerHTML = '';\n      return;\n    }\n    e.preventDefault();\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    close();\n  });\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Appearance-tab opacity slider \u2500\u2500\n   Mirrors the Theme customizer's slider: fades the settings modal's\n   background (and inner cards) via color-mix so the user can watch the\n   rest of the UI react to toggles, while keeping text/controls crisp\n   (no element opacity). Only shown/active on the Appearance tab. */\nconst _SETTINGS_PEEK = 55; // % opacity when the Peek toggle is on\nfunction _applySettingsOpacity(on) {\n  const content = modalEl && modalEl.querySelector('.settings-modal-content, .modal-content');\n  if (!content) return;\n  const cards = content.querySelectorAll('.admin-card');\n  if (on) {\n    const bgMix = `color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) ${_SETTINGS_PEEK}%, transparent)`;\n    const panelMix = `color-mix(in srgb, var(--panel) ${_SETTINGS_PEEK}%, transparent)`;\n    content.style.setProperty('background', bgMix, 'important');\n    content.style.setProperty('backdrop-filter', 'none', 'important');\n    content.style.setProperty('-webkit-backdrop-filter', 'none', 'important');\n    cards.forEach(c => {\n      c.style.setProperty('background', panelMix, 'important');\n      c.style.setProperty('backdrop-filter', 'none', 'important');\n      c.style.setProperty('-webkit-backdrop-filter', 'none', 'important');\n    });\n  } else {\n    content.style.removeProperty('background');\n    content.style.removeProperty('backdrop-filter');\n    content.style.removeProperty('-webkit-backdrop-filter');\n    cards.forEach(c => {\n      c.style.removeProperty('background');\n      c.style.removeProperty('backdrop-filter');\n      c.style.removeProperty('-webkit-backdrop-filter');\n    });\n  }\n}\n\n// Show/hide the Peek toggle for the Appearance tab and apply or clear the fade.\nfunction syncAppearanceOpacity(active) {\n  const toggle = el('settings-opacity-wrap');\n  if (toggle) toggle.classList.toggle('hidden', !active);\n  if (active) {\n    _applySettingsOpacity(toggle ? toggle.classList.contains('active') : false);\n  } else {\n    _applySettingsOpacity(false); // clear the fade off the Appearance tab\n  }\n}\n\nfunction initOpacityToggle() {\n  const toggle = el('settings-opacity-wrap');\n  if (!toggle || toggle.dataset.bound === '1') return;\n  toggle.dataset.bound = '1';\n  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    const on = !toggle.classList.contains('active');\n    toggle.classList.toggle('active', on);\n    toggle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', on ? 'true' : 'false');\n    _applySettingsOpacity(on);\n  });\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   AI TAB\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\nconst _aiEndpointRefreshers = new Set();\nlet _aiEndpointRefreshInFlight = null;\n\nasync function _fetchModelEndpoints() {\n  const epRes = await fetch('/api/model-endpoints', { credentials: 'same-origin' });\n  const endpoints = await epRes.json();\n  return Array.isArray(endpoints) ? endpoints : [];\n}\n\nfunction _endpointLabel(ep) {\n  return ep.name + (ep.online ? '' : ' (offline)');\n}\n\nfunction _fillEndpointSelect(selectEl, endpoints, selected, keepBlank) {\n  if (!selectEl) return;\n  const previous = selected !== undefined ? selected : selectEl.value;\n  const blankText = keepBlank && selectEl.options[0] && selectEl.options[0].value === ''\n    ? selectEl.options[0].textContent\n    : null;\n  while (selectEl.options.length) selectEl.remove(0);\n  if (blankText !== null) {\n    const blank = document.createElement('option');\n    blank.value = '';\n    blank.textContent = blankText;\n    selectEl.appendChild(blank);\n  }\n  (endpoints || []).forEach(function(ep) {\n    if (!ep.is_enabled) return;\n    const opt = document.createElement('option');\n    opt.value = ep.id;\n    opt.textContent = _endpointLabel(ep);\n    selectEl.appendChild(opt);\n  });\n  if (previous && Array.from(selectEl.options).some(function(o) { return o.value === previous; })) {\n    selectEl.value = previous;\n  } else if (blankText !== null) {\n    selectEl.value = '';\n  }\n}\n\nfunction _fillModelSelect(selectEl, models, selected, keepBlank) {\n  if (!selectEl) return;\n  const previous = selected !== undefined ? selected : selectEl.value;\n  const blankText = keepBlank && selectEl.options[0] && selectEl.options[0].value === ''\n    ? selectEl.options[0].textContent\n    : null;\n  while (selectEl.options.length) selectEl.remove(0);\n  if (blankText !== null) {\n    const blank = document.createElement('option');\n    blank.value = '';\n    blank.textContent = blankText;", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "6d0906c9e31f4055f2370b3221b762a1bf1103b7", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/settings.js", "display_title": "settings.js"}

> {"content": "/**\n * ModalManager \u2014 unified open/minimize/close behavior for tool modals.\n *\n * Goals:\n *  - Tab-down (swipe) and the `_` button MINIMIZE: modal hidden, JS state preserved.\n *  - The \u2715 button CLOSES: tears down via the registered closeFn.\n *  - Sidebar/rail click handler: closed \u2192 open, minimized \u2192 restore, open \u2192 minimize.\n *  - Rail icon shows a \"minimized\" badge when state is held.\n *\n * Usage from a tool module:\n *\n *   import * as Modals from './modalManager.js';\n *\n *   // After building the modal element and adding it to the body:\n *   Modals.register('gallery-modal', {\n *     railBtnId: 'tool-gallery-btn',\n *     restoreFn: () => { ...whatever the tool needs to do when un-hiding... },\n *     closeFn:   () => { ...full teardown \u2014 remove modal element etc... },\n *   });\n *\n *   // From the sidebar/rail button click handler:\n *   if (!Modals.toggle('gallery-modal')) {\n *     // No registered modal \u2014 build and open it fresh.\n *     openGallery();\n *   }\n */\n\nimport { previewZoneAt, clearPreview, snapModalToZone } from './tileManager.js';\nimport { suspendDock, resumeDock, clearRightDock, applyEdgeDock } from './modalSnap.js';\nimport { dismissOrRemove } from './escMenuStack.js';\n\nconst _state = new Map(); // id -> { restoreFn, closeFn, railBtnId, isMinimized, restoreMinHeight }\n\nconst _rememberedDockKey = (id) => `odysseus-modal-remembered-dock-${id}`;\nfunction _rememberDock(id, side) {\n  if (!id || !side) return;\n  try { localStorage.setItem(_rememberedDockKey(id), side); } catch (_) {}\n}\nfunction _forgetDock(id) {\n  if (!id) return;\n  try { localStorage.removeItem(_rememberedDockKey(id)); } catch (_) {}\n}\nfunction _getRememberedDock(id) {\n  try {\n    const side = localStorage.getItem(_rememberedDockKey(id));\n    return (side === 'left' || side === 'right') ? side : null;\n  } catch (_) {\n    return null;\n  }\n}\nfunction _applyRememberedDock(id) {\n  const side = _getRememberedDock(id);\n  if (!side) return;\n  const modal = document.getElementById(id);\n  if (!modal || modal.classList.contains('hidden') || modal.classList.contains('modal-minimized')) return;\n  try { applyEdgeDock(modal, side); } catch (e) { console.warn('apply remembered dock failed', e); }\n}\n\n// Monotonic stacking counter so the most-recently-surfaced tool window always\n// sits on top. Math.min(560, maxHeight)\n    : 0;\n  state.restoreMinHeight = `${Math.round(Math.max(minHeight, Math.min(rect.height, maxHeight)))}px`;\n}\n\nfunction _applyRestoreHeight(modal, state) {\n  if (!modal || !state?.restoreMinHeight) return;\n  const content = modal.querySelector('.modal-content');\n  if (!content) return;\n  const maxHeight = Math.max(180, window.innerHeight - 24);\n  const requested = parseInt(state.restoreMinHeight, 10);\n  const minHeight = modal.id === 'email-lib-modal' && window.innerWidth > 768\n    ? > Rasputin is structurally different: React route views with a persistent app shell, while Odysseus keeps chat as the root and opens most tools as modal/window workspaces. I’m checking our Home, Workspaces, Activity, and shell components to map the real gaps.

> {"content": "  <link rel=\"modulepreload\" href=\"/static/js/sessions.js\">\n  <link rel=\"modulepreload\" href=\"/static/js/markdown.js\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, interactive-widget=resizes-content, viewport-fit=cover\" />\n</head>\n<body>\n  <!-- Loading overlay \u2014 hides all flashing until app is ready -->\n  <div id=\"app-loader\" style=\"position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99999;background:var(--bg,#282c34);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;transition:opacity .3s\">\n    <div id=\"loader-wave\" style=\"color:var(--brand-color,var(--red,#e06c75));font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;opacity:.5\">\u2581\u2582\u2583</div>\n  </div>\n  <script nonce=\"{{CSP_NONCE}}\">\n  (function(){\n    var el=document.getElementById('loader-wave');\n    if(!el)return;\n    var frames=['\u2581\u2582\u2583','\u2582\u2583\u2584','\u2583\u2584\u2585','\u2584\u2585\u2586','\u2585\u2586\u2585','\u2586\u2585\u2584','\u2585\u2584\u2583','\u2584\u2583\u2582','\u2583\u2582\u2581'];\n    var i=0;\n    var iv=setInterval(function(){\n      if(!document.getElementById('app-loader')){clearInterval(iv);return}\n      el.textContent=frames[i%frames.length];\n      i++;\n    },150);\n    setTimeout(function(){var l=document.getElementById('app-loader');if(l){l.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){l.remove()},300)}},5000);\n  })();\n  </script>\n  <!-- Memory Management Modal -->\n  <div id=\"memory-modal\" class=\"modal hidden\">\n    <div class=\"modal-content memory-modal-content\" role=\"dialog\" aria-label=\"Brain\" style=\"background:var(--bg)\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header\">\n        <h4><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:6px\"><path d=\"M12 5a3 3 0 1 0-5.997.125 4 4 0 0 0-2.526 5.77 4 4 0 0 0 .556 6.588A4 4 0 1 0 12 18Z\"/><path d=\"M12 5a3 3 0 1 1 5.997.125 4 4 0 0 1 2.526 5.77 4 4 0 0 1-.556 6.588A4 4 0 1 1 12 18Z\"/><path d=\"M15 13a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-3-4 4.5 4.5 0 0 1-3 4\"/></svg>Brain</h4>\n        <button class=\"close-btn\" id=\"close-memory-modal\" aria-label=\"Close memory modal\">\u2716</button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body memory-modal-body\">\n        <div class=\"memory-tabs\">\n          <button class=\"memory-tab active\" data-memory-tab=\"browse\"><svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:5px\"><path d=\"M12 2a7 7 0 0 1 7 7c0 2.4-1.2 4.5-3 5.7V17a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-2.3C6.2 13.5 5 11.4 5 9a7 7 0 0 1 7-7z\"/><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"22\" x2=\"14\" y2=\"22\"/></svg>Memories <span id=\"memory-count\" class=\"memory-count\" style=\"font-size:0.8em;opacity:0.6;font-weight:normal;margin-left:4px\">0</span></button>\n          <button class=\"memory-tab\" data-memory-tab=\"skills\"><svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:5px\"><polygon points=\"13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2\"/></svg>Skills <span id=\"skills-count\" class=\"memory-count\" style=\"font-size:0.8em;opacity:0.6;font-weight:normal;margin-left:4px\">0</span></button>\n          <button class=\"memory-tab\" data-memory-tab=\"add\"><svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:5px\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"8\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"16\"/><line x1=\"8\" y1=\"12\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"12\"/></svg>Add</button>\n          <button class=\"memory-tab\" data-memory-tab=\"settings\"><svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:5px\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"/><path d=\"M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33-1.82 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82.33H9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33 1.82V9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z\"/></svg>Settings</button>\n        </div>\n        <!-- \u2500\u2500 Browse tab \u2500\u2500 -->\n        <div class=\"memory-tab-panel\" data-memory-panel=\"browse\">\n          <div class=\"admin-card\" style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;flex:1;min-height:0;\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2px;\">\n              <h2 style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin:0;padding:0;line-height:1;\">Memories <span id=\"memory-count-h2\" class=\"memory-count\" style=\"font-size:0.6em;opacity:0.6;font-weight:normal\"></span></h2>\n              <span style=\"flex:1\"></span>\n              <label class=\"admin-switch\" title=\"Include memories in chat context\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"memory-enabled-header-toggle\" checked /><span class=\"admin-slider\"></span></label>\n            </div>\n            <p class=\"memory-desc doclib-desc\" style=\"margin-top:6px;\">Long-term facts the AI remembers across chats \u2014 recall, edit, or curate.</p>\n            <div class=\"memory-toolbar\">\n              <div class=\"memory-toolbar-row\">\n                <select id=\"memory-sort\" class=\"memory-sort-select\" aria-label=\"Sort memories\">\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest</option>\n                  <option value=\"alpha\">A-Z</option>\n                  <option value=\"uses\">Most used</option>\n                </select>\n                <button id=\"memory-select-btn\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"Select multiple memories\">Select</button>\n                <button id=\"memory-tidy-btn\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"AI tidy: deduplicate and clean up memories\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:2px;\"><path d=\"M12 0L14.59 8.41L23 12L14.59 15.59L12 24L9.41 15.59L1 12L9.41 8.41Z\"/></svg> Tidy</button>\n              </div>\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"memory-search\" placeholder=\"Search memories\u2026\" class=\"memory-search-input\" aria-label=\"Search memories\" />\n              <div id=\"memory-category-filters\" class=\"memory-category-filters\">\n                <button class=\"memory-cat-chip active\" data-cat=\"all\">all</button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div id=\"memory-bulk-bar\" class=\"memory-bulk-bar hidden\">\n              <label class=\"memory-bulk-check-all\" style=\"position:relative;top:0px;\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"memory-select-all\" /> All</label>\n              <span id=\"memory-selected-count\">0 Selected</span>\n              <button id=\"memory-bulk-delete\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn danger\" disabled><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><polyline points=\"3 6 5 6 21 6\"/><path d=\"M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6\"/><path d=\"M10 11v6\"/><path d=\"M14 11v6\"/></svg>Delete</button>\n              <button id=\"memory-bulk-cancel\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"Cancel (Esc)\" style=\"margin-left:4px;padding:3px 6px;\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/></svg></button>\n            </div>\n            <div id=\"memory-list\" class=\"memory-list\"></div>\n            <div id=\"memory-suggestions-body\" class=\"memory-suggestions hidden\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <!-- \u2500\u2500 Add tab \u2500\u2500 -->\n        <div class=\"memory-tab-panel hidden\" data-memory-panel=\"add\">\n          <div class=\"admin-card\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2px;\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0;padding:0;line-height:1;\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:6px\"><path d=\"M12 2a7 7 0 0 1 7 7c0 2.4-1.2 4.5-3 5.7V17a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-2.3C6.2 13.5 5 11.4 5 9a7 7 0 0 1 7-7z\"/><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"22\" x2=\"14\" y2=\"22\"/></svg>Add Memory</h2>\n              <span style=\"flex:1\"></span>\n              <button id=\"memory-import-btn\" class=\"theme-io-btn\" title=\"Import memories from a file\" style=\"height:26px;font-size:12px;\"><svg width=\"13\" height=\"13\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;\"><path d=\"M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4\"/><polyline points=\"7 10 12 15 17 10\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"15\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"3\"/></svg>Import</button>\n              <button id=\"memory-export-btn\" class=\"theme-io-btn\" title=\"Export all memories as JSON\" style=\"height:26px;font-size:12px;\"><svg width=\"13\" height=\"13\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;\"><path d=\"M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4\"/><polyline points=\"17 8 12 3 7 8\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"3\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"15\"/></svg>Export</button>\n              <input type=\"file\" id=\"memory-import-file\" accept=\".txt,.md,.pdf,.csv,.log,.json,.py,.js,.html\" hidden />\n            </div>\n            <p class=\"memory-desc doclib-desc\" style=\"margin:4px 0 6px;\">\n              Import a <code>.txt</code>, <code>.md</code>, <code>.pdf</code>, <code>.csv</code>, <code>.log</code>, <code>.json</code>, <code>.py</code>, <code>.js</code>, or <code>.html</code> file &mdash; the AI reads it and suggests candidate memories you can approve.\n            </p>\n            <div class=\"memory-add-row\" style=\"margin-top:8px;\">\n              <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"flex:1;min-width:0;\">\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"new-memory-input\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" aria-label=\"New memory text\" />\n                <span class=\"skill-rich-ph\"><span class=\"k\">Add a memory</span> &mdash; e.g. 'I prefer concise replies' <svg class=\"k\" width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-left:4px;\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><polyline points=\"9 10 4 15 9 20\"/><path d=\"M20 4v7a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H4\"/></svg></span>\n              </div>\n              <select id=\"new-memory-category\" class=\"memory-edit-cat-select\" aria-label=\"Memory category\"></select>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"admin-card\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2px;\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0;padding:0;line-height:1;\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:6px\"><polygon points=\"13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2\"/></svg>Add Skill</h2>\n            </div>\n            <p class=\"memory-desc doclib-desc\" style=\"margin-top:6px;\">Import a skill from GitHub or <a href=\"https://skills.sh\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">skills.sh</a> (folder with <code>SKILL.md</code> and optional templates).</p>\n            <div class=\"memory-add-row\" style=\"margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:10px;\">\n              <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"flex:1;min-width:0;\">\n                <input type=\"url\" id=\"skill-import-url\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" aria-label=\"Skill import URL\" />\n                <span class=\"skill-rich-ph\"><span class=\"k\">Import URL</span> \u2014 e.g. GitHub tree link to a skill folder</span>\n              </div>\n              <button type=\"button\" id=\"skill-import-url-btn\" class=\"theme-io-btn\" title=\"Import skill from URL\" style=\"flex:none;height:28px;font-size:12px;\"><svg width=\"13\" height=\"13\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4\"/><polyline points=\"7 10 12 15 17 10\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"15\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"3\"/></svg>Import</button>\n            </div>\n            <p class=\"memory-desc doclib-desc\" style=\"margin-top:0;\">Or create a skill by hand \u2014 title, what it solves, and an approach.</p>\n            <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"margin-top:4px;margin-bottom:6px;\">\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"new-skill-title\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" aria-label=\"Skill title\" />\n              <span class=\"skill-rich-ph\"><span class=\"k\">Title</span> \u2014 short name, e.g. \u201cbuild-vllm-wheel\u201d</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"margin-bottom:6px;\">\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"new-skill-problem\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" aria-label=\"When to use this skill\" />\n              <span class=\"skill-rich-ph\"><span class=\"k\">When to use</span> \u2014 what problem does this skill solve?</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"margin-bottom:6px;\">\n              <textarea id=\"new-skill-solution\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" rows=\"2\" style=\"resize:vertical;\" aria-label=\"How \u2014 the approach or steps\"></textarea>\n              <span class=\"skill-rich-ph skill-rich-ph-top\"><span class=\"k\">How</span> \u2014 the approach, steps, commands, or rules to follow</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"skill-ph-wrap\" style=\"margin-bottom:8px;\">\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"new-skill-tags\" placeholder=\" \" class=\"memory-add-input skill-hint-input\" aria-label=\"Tags\" />\n              <span class=\"skill-rich-ph\"><span class=\"k\">Tags</span> \u2014 comma-separated, e.g. python, build, vllm</span>\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;\">\n              <button id=\"add-skill-btn\" class=\"confirm-btn confirm-btn-primary\">Add Skill</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <!-- \u2500\u2500 Skills tab \u2500\u2500 -->\n        <div class=\"memory-tab-panel hidden\" data-memory-panel=\"skills\">\n          <div class=\"admin-card\" style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;flex:1;min-height:0;\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2px;\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0;padding:0;line-height:1;\">Skills <span id=\"skills-count-h2\" class=\"memory-count\" style=\"font-size:0.6em;opacity:0.6;font-weight:normal\"></span></h2>\n              <span style=\"flex:1\"></span>\n              <label class=\"admin-switch\" title=\"Inject relevant skills into chat context\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"skills-enabled-header-toggle\" checked /><span class=\"admin-slider\"></span></label>\n            </div>\n            <p class=\"memory-desc doclib-desc\" style=\"margin-top:6px;\">Reusable procedures the AI can call via /skill \u2014 sort by confidence to surface the proven ones.</p>\n            <div class=\"memory-toolbar\">\n              <div class=\"memory-toolbar-row\">\n                <select id=\"skills-sort\" class=\"memory-sort-select\">\n                  <optgroup label=\"Sort\">\n                    <option value=\"sort:confidence\">Confidence</option>\n                    <option value=\"sort:uses\">Most used</option>\n                    <option value=\"sort:alpha\">A-Z</option>\n                    <option value=\"sort:recent\">Recent</option>\n                  </optgroup>\n                  <optgroup label=\"Filter\">\n                    <option value=\"filter:all\">All skills</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:drafts\">Drafts only</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:published\">Published only</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf95\">Confidence \u2264 95%</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf90\">Confidence \u2264 90%</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf85\">Confidence \u2264 85%</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf80\">Confidence \u2264 80%</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf75\">Confidence \u2264 75%</option>\n                    <option value=\"filter:conf70\">Confidence \u2264 70%</option>\n                  </optgroup>\n                </select>\n                <button id=\"skills-select-btn\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"Select multiple skills\">Select</button>\n                <button id=\"skills-audit-btn\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"Test every skill, auto-fix the weak ones, flag what still fails\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><path d=\"M12 0L14.59 8.41L23 12L14.59 15.59L12 24L9.41 15.59L1 12L9.41 8.41Z\"/></svg>Audit all</button>\n              </div>\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"skills-search\" placeholder=\"Search skills\u2026\" class=\"memory-search-input\" aria-label=\"Search skills\" />\n            </div>\n            <div id=\"skills-audit-panel\" class=\"skills-audit-panel hidden\"></div>\n            <div id=\"skills-bulk-bar\" class=\"memory-bulk-bar hidden\">\n              <label class=\"memory-bulk-check-all\" style=\"position:relative;top:0px;\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"skills-select-all\" /> All</label>\n              <span id=\"skills-selected-count\">0 Selected</span>\n              <button id=\"skills-bulk-publish\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" disabled title=\"Publish selected drafts\" style=\"margin-left:auto;\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><polyline points=\"20 6 9 17 4 12\"/></svg>Approve</button>\n              <button id=\"skills-bulk-audit\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" disabled title=\"Audit selected draft skills\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><polygon points=\"5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3\"/></svg>Audit</button>\n              <button id=\"skills-bulk-delete-nonpassing\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn danger\" disabled title=\"Delete selected duplicates, generic/irrelevant skills, failed audits, and skills below threshold\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><path d=\"M3 6h18\"/><path d=\"M8 6V4h8v2\"/><path d=\"M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6\"/><path d=\"M10 11l4 4\"/><path d=\"M14 11l-4 4\"/></svg>Delete non passing</button>\n              <button id=\"skills-bulk-delete\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn danger\" disabled><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:3px;\"><polyline points=\"3 6 5 6 21 6\"/><path d=\"M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6\"/><path d=\"M10 11v6\"/><path d=\"M14 11v6\"/></svg>Delete</button>\n              <button id=\"skills-bulk-cancel\" class=\"memory-toolbar-btn\" title=\"Cancel (Esc)\" style=\"padding:3px 6px;\"><svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/></svg></button>\n            </div>\n            <div id=\"skills-list\" class=\"memory-list\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <!-- \u2500\u2500 Settings tab \u2500\u2500 -->\n        <div class=\"memory-tab-panel hidden\" data-memory-panel=\"settings\">\n          <div class=\"admin-card\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0\">Auto-extract memories</h2>\n              <label class=\"admin-switch\" style=\"flex-shrink:0\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"auto-memory-toggle\" checked /><span class=\"admin-slider\"></span></label>\n            </div>\n            <span class=\"admin-toggle-sub\" style=\"display:block;margin-top:6px\">Automatically extract memories from conversations.</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"admin-card\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0\">Auto-extract skills</h2>\n              <label class=\"admin-switch\" style=\"flex-shrink:0\"><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"auto-skills-toggle\" /><span class=\"admin-slider\"></span></label>\n            </div>\n            <span class=\"admin-toggle-sub\" style=\"display:block;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.6\">Automatically draft reusable skills from your workflows. Audit all can publish passing skills using the threshold below.</span>\n            <span class=\"admin-toggle-sub\" style=\"display:block;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.6\">The library can grow; cleanup retires weak/duplicate skills only after review.</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"admin-card\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px\">\n              <h2 style=\"margin:0\">Inject Skills</h2>\n            </div>\n            <span class=\"admin-toggle-sub\" style=\"display:block;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.6\">Controls how many relevant published or approved skills are added to each agent request.</span>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-top:8px\">\n              <span class=\"admin-toggle-sub\" style=\"margin:0\">Max skills per request</span>\n              <input type=\"number\" id=\"skill-max-input\" min=\"0\" max=\"12\" step=\"1\" value=\"3\" aria-label=\"Max skills to inject\" style=\"flex-shrink:0;width:72px;background:var(--input-bg,var(--panel));color:var(--fg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px > {"content": "// static/js/chatRenderer.js\n// Extracted from chat.js \u2014 message rendering, sources, images, metrics\n\nimport uiModule from './ui.js';\nimport markdownModule from './markdown.js';\nimport { addAITTSButton } from './tts-ai.js';\nimport { providerLogo, providerLabel } from './providers.js';\nimport settingsModule from './settings.js';\nimport spinnerModule from './spinner.js';\nimport { bindMenuDismiss } from './escMenuStack.js';\nimport { matchModelKey } from './model/matchKey.js';\n\nconst SEARCH_ICON = '<svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"8\"/><path d=\"M21 21l-4.35-4.35\"/></svg>';\nconst REPORT_ICON = '<svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z\"/><polyline points=\"14 2 14 8 20 8\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"13\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"13\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"17\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"17\"/><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"9\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"9\"/></svg>';\nconst CHAT_ABOUT_ICON = '<svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z\"/></svg>';\nconst COPY_ICON = '<svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><rect x=\"9\" y=\"9\" width=\"13\" height=\"13\" rx=\"2\"/><path d=\"M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1\"/></svg>';\nconst CHECK_ICON = '<svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><polyline points=\"20 6 9 17 4 12\"/></svg>';\n\n/** Sanitize a URL for use in href \u2014 only allow http(s) and protocol-relative. */\nfunction _safeHref(url) {\n  if (!url) return '#';\n  try {\n    var parsed = new URL(url, window.location.origin);\n    if (parsed.protocol === 'http:' || parsed.protocol === 'https:') return uiModule.esc(url);\n  } catch(e) { /* invalid URL */ }\n  return '#';\n}\n\nexport function safeToolScreenshotSrc(raw) {\n  const src = String(raw || '').trim();\n  if (/^data:image\\/(?:png|jpe?g|gif|webp);base64,[a-z0-9+/=\\s]+$/i.test(src)) {\n    return src;\n  }\n  return '';\n}\n\nexport function safeDisplayImageSrc(raw) {\n  const src = String(raw || '').trim();\n  if (!src) return '';\n  if (/^data:image\\/(?:png|jpe?g|gif|webp);base64,[a-z0-9+/=\\s]+$/i.test(src)) {\n    return src;\n  }\n  try {\n    const parsed = new URL(src, window.location.origin);\n    if (parsed.protocol === 'http:' || parsed.protocol === 'https:') {\n      return parsed.href;\n    }\n  } catch (_) {}\n  return '';\n}\n\nfunction _makeActionBtn(className, title, text, handler) {\n  const btn = document.createElement('button');\n  btn.className = className;\n  btn.type = 'button';\n  btn.title = title;\n  btn.textContent = text;\n  btn.addEventListener('click', handler);\n  return btn;\n}\n\n// Attachment card helpers\nfunction _attachIcon(mimeOrName) {\n  const s = (mimeOrName || '').toLowerCase();\n  if (s.startsWith('image/') || /\\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg)$/i.test(s))\n    return '<svg class=\"attach-card-icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"><rect x=\"3\" y=\"3\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\"/><circle cx=\"8.5\" cy=\"8.5\" r=\"1.5\"/><path d=\"M21 15l-5-5L5 21\"/></svg>';\n  if (s.startsWith('audio/') || /\\.(mp3|wav|ogg|m4a|webm)$/i.test(s))\n    return '<svg class=\"attach-card-icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"><path d=\"M9 18V5l12-2v13\"/><circle cx=\"6\" cy=\"18\" r=\"3\"/><circle cx=\"18\" cy=\"16\" r=\"3\"/></svg>';\n  if (s === 'application/pdf' || /\\.pdf$/i.test(s))\n    return '<svg class=\"attach-card-icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"><path d=\"M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z\"/><polyline points=\"14 2 14 8 20 8\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"13\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"13\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"17\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"17\"/></svg>';\n  // Default: generic document\n  return '<svg class=\"attach-card-icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"><path d=\"M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z\"/><polyline points=\"14 2 14 8 20 8\"/></svg>';\n}\nfunction _formatSize(bytes) {\n  if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + ' B';\n  if (bytes < 1048576) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';\n  return (bytes / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB';\n}\n\n// Build the `.attach-cards` element for a message's attachment list. Shared by\n// addMessage and updateMessageAttachments so a live (optimistic) user bubble\n// can be re-rendered with real upload ids once the upload resolves.\nfunction buildAttachCards(attachments) {\n  const attachWrap = document.createElement('div');\n  attachWrap.className = 'attach-cards';\n  for (const att of attachments) {\n    const isImage = (att.mime || '').startsWith('image/') || /\\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|bmp)$/i.test(att.name || '');\n    if (isImage) {\n      // Image preview. Shown for both uploaded (att.id present) and still-\n      // uploading attachments. A shimmering skeleton + whirlpool fills the\n      // space until either the upload resolves (no id yet) or the thumbnail\n      // image finishes loading, so the photo doesn't pop in abruptly.\n      const imgWrap = document.createElement('div');\n      imgWrap.className = 'attach-image-preview';\n      imgWrap.style.cursor = att.id ? 'zoom-in' : 'default';\n      if (att.id) imgWrap.dataset.fileId = att.id;\n      if (att.id) {\n        imgWrap.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n          // Tapping the corner OCR button shouldn't also open the lightbox.\n          if (e.target.closest('.attach-ocr-btn')) return;\n          _openImageLightbox(att);\n        });\n      }\n\n      let skel = null;\n      let sp = null;\n      if (!att.previewUrl) {\n        // Skeleton placeholder with a centered whirlpool. Self-stops when removed.\n        skel = document.createElement('div');\n        skel.className = 'attach-image-skeleton';\n        // Match the photo's aspect ratio when the backend knew it at upload\n        // time, so the skeleton doesn't sit at a 4:3 default and then snap to\n        // a portrait shape when the image arrives.\n        if (att.width && att.height) {\n          skel.style.aspectRatio = att.width + ' / ' + att.height;\n          skel.style.width = 'auto';\n          skel.style.height = 'auto';\n          skel.style.maxWidth = '300px';\n          skel.style.maxHeight = '200px';\n          skel.style.minWidth = '80px';\n        }\n        sp = spinnerModule.createWhirlpool(20);\n        skel.appendChild(sp.element);\n        imgWrap.appendChild(skel);\n      }\n\n      if (att.id || att.previewUrl) {\n        const img = document.createElement('img');\n        // Small cached thumbnail \u2014 the preview is tiny, no need to pull the\n        // full-resolution photo. Click still opens the full image.\n        img.alt = att.name || 'Image';\n        img.loading = 'lazy';\n        img.style.cssText = 'max-width:300px;max-height:200px;border-radius:6px;display:' + (att.previewUrl ? 'block' : 'none') + ';';\n        let _revealed = false;\n        let _revealTimer = null;\n        const _reveal = () => {\n          if (_revealed) return;\n          _revealed = true;\n          if (_revealTimer) { clearTimeout(_revealTimer); _revealTimer = null; }\n          img.style.display = 'block';\n          try { sp && sp.stop(); } catch {}\n          if (skel) skel.remove();\n        };\n        img.addEventListener('load', _reveal);\n        img.addEventListener('error', _reveal);\n        img.src = att.previewUrl || `/api/upload/${att.id}?thumb=1`;\n        // Cached images can be complete before the load listener attaches.\n        if (img.complete && img.naturalWidth) _reveal();\n        // Failsafe: if neither load nor error fires within 8s, reveal anyway.\n        // The timer is cleared on reveal AND when updateMessageAttachments\n        // replaces the card (which scrubs the img / skel from the DOM), so\n        // repeated re-renders don't accumulate stranded timers.\n        if (!att.previewUrl) _revealTimer = setTimeout(_reveal, 8000);\n        imgWrap.appendChild(img);\n\n        if (att.id) {\n          // Small corner button \u2192 opens the vision/OCR editor so the user can\n          // correct what the vision model extracted. The edit is cached on the\n          // server keyed by file id, so any later message referencing this same\n          // image picks up the corrected text instead of re-running the model.\n          const ocrBtn = document.createElement('button');\n          ocrBtn.type = 'button';\n          ocrBtn.className = 'attach-ocr-btn';\n          ocrBtn.title = 'View / edit OCR text';\n          ocrBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M12 20h9\"/><path d=\"M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4 12.5-12.5z\"/></svg><span class=\"attach-ocr-label\">Caption</span>';\n          ocrBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n            _openVisionEditor(att, ocrBtn.closest('.msg'));\n          });\n          imgWrap.appendChild(ocrBtn);\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (att.vision_model) {\n        const visionLabel = document.createElement('div');\n        visionLabel.className = 'attach-vision-model';\n        visionLabel.textContent = 'Vision: ' + String(att.vision_model).split('/').pop();\n        imgWrap.appendChild(visionLabel);\n      }\n      if (att.name) {\n        const label = document.createElement('div');\n        label.className = 'attach-image-name';\n        label.textContent = att.name;\n        imgWrap.appendChild(label);\n      }\n      attachWrap.appendChild(imgWrap);\n    } else {\n      // Non-image file card\n      const card = document.createElement('div');\n      card.className = 'attach-card';\n      card.dataset.name = att.name;\n      if (att.id) {\n        card.dataset.fileId = att.id;\n        card.style.cursor = 'pointer';\n        card.addEventListener('click', () => {\n          // PDFs & text/code/markdown \u2192 open in the Documents viewer\n          // (others fall back to the raw file).\n          if (window.chatModule?.openAttachment) window.chatModule.openAttachment(att, false);\n          else window.open(`/api/upload/${att.id}`, '_blank');\n        });\n      }\n      const icon = _attachIcon(att.mime || att.name);\n      const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');\n      nameSpan.className = 'attach-card-name';\n      nameSpan.textContent = att.name;\n      card.innerHTML = icon;\n      card.appendChild(nameSpan);\n      if (att.size) {\n        const sizeSpan = document.createElement('span');\n        sizeSpan.className = 'attach-card-size';\n        sizeSpan.textContent = _formatSize(att.size);\n        card.appendChild(sizeSpan);\n      }\n      attachWrap.appendChild(card);\n    }\n  }\n  return attachWrap;\n}\n\n// Re-render the attachment cards of an already-rendered message. Used to swap\n// in real upload ids (and image thumbnails) on the optimistic user bubble once\n// uploadPending() resolves \u2014 otherwise image previews only appear after a\n// refresh, because the bubble is rendered before the upload assigns ids.\nexport function updateMessageAttachments(msgWrap, attachments) {\n  if (!msgWrap || !attachments?.length) return;\n  const body = msgWrap.querySelector('.body') || msgWrap;\n  const existing = body.querySelector('.attach-cards');\n  const fresh = buildAttachCards(attachments);\n  if (existing) existing.replaceWith(fresh);\n  else body.appendChild(fresh);\n}\n\n// Quick full-size preview when the user taps a chat photo thumbnail. Just an\n// overlay with the original image centered \u2014 no Gallery panel, no editor.\nfunction _openImageLightbox(att) {\n  if (!att?.id) return;\n  const overlay = document.createElement('div');\n  overlay.className = 'attach-lightbox';\n  // Show the cached thumb immediately so the overlay doesn't sit blank\n  // while a 25MB original streams in. The full image swaps in once loaded;\n  // if the full load fails (404 / network), we keep the thumb + show an\n  // error label rather than a blank overlay forever.\n  const img = document.createElement('img');\n  img.alt = att.name || '';\n  img.src = `/api/upload/${att.id}?thumb=1`;\n  overlay.appendChild(img);\n  const full = new Image();\n  full.addEventListener('load', () => { img.src = full.src; });\n  full.addEventListener('error', () => {\n    const err = document.createElement('div');\n    err.className = 'attach-lightbox-err';\n    err.textContent = 'Failed to load full-resolution image.';\n    overlay.appendChild(err);\n  });\n  full.src = `/api/upload/${att.id}`;\n\n  const _onKey = (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') _close(); };\n  const _close = () => {\n    document.removeEventListener('keydown', _onKey);\n    if (_overlayObs) { try { _overlayObs.disconnect(); } catch {} }", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "7c6ecd0964cb4425e8494ce7065b35d77f9e0335", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/chatRenderer.js", "display_title": "chatRenderer.js"}

> {"content": "// static/js/storage.js\n// Centralized localStorage access with key constants and JSON parse safety\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Key constants \u2500\u2500\nexport const KEYS = {\n  THEME: 'odysseus-theme',\n  TOGGLES: 'odysseus-toggles',\n  SIDEBAR_COLLAPSED: 'sidebar-collapsed',\n  SIDEBAR_WIDTH: 'sidebar-width',\n  SIDEBAR_SIDE: 'sidebar-side',\n  CURRENT_SESSION: 'currentSessionId',\n  COMPARE_SAVE: 'compare-save-results',\n  COMPARE_CHAT: 'compare-continue-chat',\n  COMPARE_BLIND: 'compare-blind',\n  COMPARE_RANDOM: 'compare-randomize',\n  MODELS_EXPANDED: 'odysseus-model-expanded',\n  MODEL_ENDPOINTS: 'odysseus-model-endpoints',\n  MODEL_SELECTED: 'odysseus-selected-model',\n  SORT_ORDER: 'odysseus-sessions-sort',\n  CHAT_SEARCH_SCOPE: 'odysseus-search-scope',\n  INCOGNITO: 'odysseus-incognito',\n  RAG_ACTIVE: 'odysseus-rag-active',\n  MCP_ACTIVE: 'odysseus-mcp-active',\n  SECTION_ORDER: 'sidebar-section-order',\n  ADMIN_LAST_TAB: 'admin-last-tab',\n  DENSITY: 'odysseus-density',\n  WORKSPACE: 'odysseus-workspace'\n};\n\n/**\n * Safely get and parse a JSON value from localStorage.\n * Returns fallback on any error.\n */\nexport function getJSON(key, fallback) {\n  try {\n    const raw = localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (raw === null) return fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null;\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn('[Storage] Failed to parse key \"' + key + '\":', e.message);\n    return fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Set a JSON-serialized value in localStorage.\n */\nexport function setJSON(key, value) {\n  try {\n    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn('[Storage] Failed to set key \"' + key + '\":', e.message);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get a raw string value from localStorage.\n */\nexport function get(key, fallback) {\n  try {\n    const val = localStorage.getItem(key);\n    return val !== null ? val : (fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return fallback !== undefined ? fallback : null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Set a raw string value in localStorage.\n */\nexport function set(key, value) {\n  try {\n    localStorage.setItem(key, value);\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn('[Storage] Failed to set key \"' + key + '\":', e.message);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Remove a key from localStorage.\n */\nexport function remove(key) {\n  try {\n    localStorage.removeItem(key);\n  } catch (e) {\n    // Ignore removal errors\n  }\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500 Toggle state helpers \u2500\u2500\n\nexport function loadToggleState() {\n  return getJSON(KEYS.TOGGLES, {});\n}\n\nexport function saveToggleState(state) {\n  setJSON(KEYS.TOGGLES, state);\n}\n\nexport function getToggle(name, fallback) {\n  const state = loadToggleState();\n  return state[name] !== undefined ? state[name] : (fallback !== undefined ? fallback : false);\n}\n\nexport function setToggle(name, value) {\n  const state = loadToggleState();\n  state[name] = value;\n  saveToggleState(state);\n}\n\nconst Storage = {\n  KEYS,\n  getJSON,\n  setJSON,\n  get,\n  set,\n  remove,\n  loadToggleState,\n  saveToggleState,\n  getToggle,\n  setToggle\n};\n\nexport default Storage;", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "7ff9c6bd52b8de0f70e3ea44b249a8b95aef77f4", "display_url": "https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus/blob/dev/static/js/storage.js", "display_title": "storage.js"}
> ```
